This broad understanding of nature enables scientists to delineate specific forces which, together, comprise natural selection.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 能够提高适应度的性状,例如更强的生存能力和更高的繁殖力。反过来,携带不那么有利或有害的等位基因会导致适应度降低,使这种等位基因很可能变得更为稀少,即受到选择的淘汰。重要的是,等位基因的适应度并非固定不变;一旦环境发生变化,原先中性或有害的性状可能变得有利,而原先有利的性状则可能变得有害。然而,即便选择的方向真的如此逆转,过去丧失的性状也未必会以完全相同的形式重新进化出来。诸如此类的“返祖现象”被称为隔代遗传。在种群内部,针对某一可在一定数值范围内变化的性状(如身高)所进行的自然选择,可以分为三种不同类型。第一种是定向选择,即某一性状的平均值随时间发生偏移,例如生物体逐渐变高。第二种是分裂选择,它青睐性状的极端数值,往往导致两个不同的数值变得最为常见,而中间的平均值则受到淘汰。这种情形就是矮的或高的生物体各有优势,而中等身高者则没有。最后一种是稳定选择,它淘汰两端的极端数值,从而使平均值周围的方差减小,多样性降低。例如,这会使生物体最终趋于具有相近的身高。笼统地说,自然选择把大自然作为衡量标准,据此判断个体及其各项性状存活下来的可能性高低。这里所说的“大自然”指的是一个生态系统,即生物体与其所处环境中其他一切要素(无论是物理的还是生物的)相互作用的系统。生态学的奠基人之一尤金·奥德姆将生态系统定义为:“任何一个包含全部生物体……在特定区域内与物理环境相互作用,使能量流动形成系统内界限分明的营养结构、生物多样性和物质循环的单元……”生态系统中的每个种群都占据着独特的生态位或位置,与系统的其他部分有着各自不同的关系。这些关系涉及生物体的生活史、它在食物链中的位置以及它的地理分布范围。对大自然的这种宏观理解,使科学家能够厘清那些共同构成自然选择的具体作用力。

paragraphs.text: Germany promised to support Austria-Hungary's invasion of Serbia, but interpretations of what this meant differed. Previously tested deployment plans had been replaced early in 1914, but those had never been tested in exercises. Austro-Hungarian leaders believed Germany would cover its northern flank against Russia. Beginning on 12 August, the Austrians and Serbs clashed at the battles of the Cer and Kolubara; over the next two weeks, Austrian attacks were repulsed with heavy losses. As a result, Austria had to keep sizeable forces on the Serbian front, weakening their efforts against Russia. Serbia's victory against Austria-Hungary in the 1914 invasion has been called one of the major upset victories of the twentieth century. In 1915, the campaign saw the first use of anti-aircraft warfare after an Austrian plane was shot down with ground-to-air fire, as well as the first medical evacuation by the Serbian army. Rather than a direct attack across their shared frontier, the German right wing would sweep through the Netherlands and Belgium, then swing south, encircling Paris and trapping the French army against the Swiss border. Under Schlieffen, 85% of German forces in the west were assigned to the right wing, with the remainder holding along the frontier. By keeping his left-wing deliberately weak, he hoped to lure the French into an offensive into the "lost provinces" of Alsace-Lorraine, which was the strategy envisaged by their Plan XVII. He also considered Dutch neutrality essential for German trade and cancelled the incursion into the Netherlands, which meant any delays in Belgium threatened the viability of the plan. Historian Richard Holmes argues that these changes meant the right wing was not strong enough to achieve decisive success. The initial German advance in the West was very successful. The French army, reinforced by the British expeditionary corps, seized this opportunity to counter-attack and pushed the German army 40 to 80 km back. Both armies were then so exhausted that no decisive move could be implemented, so they settled in trenches, with the vain hope of breaking through as soon as they could build local superiority. However, communications problems and questionable command decisions cost Germany the chance of a decisive outcome, while it had failed to achieve the primary objective of avoiding a long, two-front war. It will go on for a long time but lost it is already.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 德国承诺支持奥匈帝国入侵塞尔维亚,但对这一承诺含义的理解却各不相同。此前经过检验的部署方案在1914年初已被替换,而新的方案从未在演习中受过检验。奥匈帝国的领导人相信,德国会替他们守住北面、抵御俄国。从8月12日起,奥军与塞军在采尔山战役和科卢巴拉战役中交战;在接下来的两周里,奥军的进攻被击退,损失惨重。结果,奥地利不得不在塞尔维亚战线上保留相当规模的兵力,削弱了对俄国作战的力量。塞尔维亚在1914年这场入侵中战胜奥匈帝国,被称为20世纪最重大的爆冷胜利之一。1915年,在这场战事中,一架奥地利飞机被对空火力击落,这是防空作战的首次运用,塞尔维亚军队也首次进行了医疗后送。德军的右翼不会越过德法共同边界发动正面进攻,而是会横扫荷兰和比利时,然后向南回旋,包围巴黎,把法军逼到瑞士边境一带困住。在施里芬的方案下,德军在西线85%的兵力被分配给右翼,其余兵力则沿边界一线据守。他故意让左翼保持薄弱,希望以此诱使法军向阿尔萨斯-洛林这两个“失地省份”发动进攻,而这正是法军第十七号计划所设想的战略。他还认为荷兰的中立对德国的贸易至关重要,于是取消了对荷兰的入侵,这意味着在比利时的任何延误都会危及整个计划的可行性。历史学家理查德·霍姆斯认为,这些改动使得右翼的力量不足以取得决定性的胜利。德军在西线最初的推进非常成功。法军在英国远征军的增援下,抓住这一时机发动反攻,把德军逼退了40到80公里。随后两军都已精疲力竭,谁也无法实施决定性的行动,于是双方在战壕中安顿下来,徒然期盼着一旦在局部建立起优势便立即突破。然而,通信方面的问题和值得商榷的指挥决策,使德国错失了取得决定性结果的机会,同时也未能实现避免陷入长期两线作战这一首要目标。这场战争还会持续很久,但败局其实已定。

paragraphs.text: Early eating establishments recognizable as restaurants in the modern sense emerged in Song dynasty China during the 11th and 12th centuries. In large cities, such as Kaifeng and Hangzhou, food catering establishments catered to merchants who travelled between cities. Probably growing out of tea houses and taverns which catered to travellers, Kaifeng's restaurants blossomed into an industry that catered to locals as well as people from other regions of China. As travelling merchants were not used to the local cuisine of other cities, these establishments were set up to serve dishes familiar to merchants from other parts of China. Such establishments were located in the entertainment districts of major cities, alongside hotels, bars, and brothels. The larger and more opulent of these establishments offered a dining experience similar to modern restaurant culture. According to a Chinese manuscript from 1126, patrons of one such establishment were greeted with a selection of pre-plated demonstration dishes which represented food options. Customers had their orders taken by a team of waiters who would then sing their orders to the kitchen and distribute the dishes in the exact order in which they had been ordered.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 在11世纪和12世纪的中国宋朝,出现了可被视为现代意义上餐馆的早期餐饮场所。在开封、杭州等大城市,餐饮场所专门接待往来于各城市之间的商人。开封的餐馆很可能是从接待旅客的茶馆和酒肆发展而来,后来兴盛成为一个既服务本地人、也服务来自中国其他地区的人的行业。由于行商不习惯其他城市的本地菜肴,这些场所便专门开设,供应来自中国各地的商人所熟悉的菜品。这类场所位于大城市的娱乐区,与旅馆、酒馆和妓院毗邻而设。其中规模更大、更为奢华的场所,提供着与现代餐馆文化相似的用餐体验。据一份1126年的中国手稿记载,某家此类场所会先用一组预先装盘、用于展示的样菜来迎接顾客,这些样菜代表着可供选择的菜品。由一队侍者为顾客点菜,随后他们会用唱报的方式把菜单传给厨房,并严格按照顾客点菜的先后顺序上菜。

paragraphs.text: Direct observational tests are not available: objects observed to have mass higher than the predictions for neutron stars are assumed to be black holes. Recent evidence from gravitational wave events suggests modifications of these theories may be needed. New exotic phases of matter could allow other kinds of massive objects. Quark stars would be made up of quark matter and supported by quark degeneracy pressure, a form of degeneracy pressure even stronger than neutron degeneracy pressure. This would halt gravitational collapse at a higher mass than for a neutron star. Even stronger stars called electroweak stars would convert quarks in their cores into leptons, providing additional pressure to stop the star from collapsing. If, as some extensions of the Standard Model posit, quarks and leptons are made up of the even-smaller fundamental particles called preons, a very compact star could be supported by preon degeneracy pressure. A few theoretical objects have been conjectured to match observations of astronomical black hole candidates identically or near-identically, but which function via a different mechanism. A dark energy star would convert infalling matter into vacuum energy; This vacuum energy would be much larger than the vacuum energy of outside space, exerting outwards pressure and preventing a singularity from forming.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 目前还没有直接的观测检验手段:凡是观测到质量超过中子星理论上限的天体,都被假定为黑洞。近来来自引力波事件的证据表明,这些理论可能需要加以修正。物质新的奇异相态可能允许存在其他种类的大质量天体。夸克星将由夸克物质构成,并由夸克简并压支撑,这是一种比中子简并压更强的简并压。这会使引力坍缩在比中子星更高的质量处就被遏制。还有一种更为强劲的恒星,称为电弱星,它会把核心处的夸克转化为轻子,从而提供额外的压力来阻止恒星坍缩。如果像标准模型的某些扩展理论所设想的那样,夸克和轻子是由更小的、称为前子的基本粒子构成,那么一颗极为致密的恒星就可能由前子简并压支撑。有人推测存在少数几种理论天体,它们与天文观测到的黑洞候选体完全或几乎完全相符,但其作用机制却各不相同。暗能量星会把落入其中的物质转化为真空能;这种真空能会远大于外部空间的真空能,从而向外施加压力,阻止奇点的形成。

paragraphs.text: While atoms are too small to be seen, devices such as the scanning tunneling microscope enable their visualization at the surfaces of solids. The microscope uses the quantum tunneling phenomenon, which allows particles to pass through a barrier that would be insurmountable in the classical perspective. Electrons tunnel through the vacuum between two biased electrodes, providing a tunneling current that is exponentially dependent on their separation. One electrode is a sharp tip ideally ending with a single atom. At each point of the scan of the surface the tip's height is adjusted so as to keep the tunneling current at a set value. How much the tip moves to and away from the surface is interpreted as the height profile. For low bias, the microscope images the averaged electron orbitals across closely packed energy levels, the local density of the electronic states near the Fermi level. Because of the distances involved, both electrodes need to be extremely stable; only then periodicities can be observed that correspond to individual atoms. The method alone is not chemically specific, and cannot identify the atomic species present at the surface.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 虽然原子太小而无法被肉眼看到,但扫描隧道显微镜之类的设备能够让人们在固体表面观察到原子。这种显微镜利用了量子隧穿现象,该现象使粒子能够穿过在经典物理视角下本无法逾越的势垒。电子隧穿过两个施加了偏压的电极之间的真空,产生一种隧穿电流,其大小随两极间距呈指数关系变化。其中一个电极是尖锐的针尖,理想情况下其末端仅由单个原子构成。在扫描表面的每一点时,针尖的高度都会被调整,以使隧穿电流保持在设定的数值。针尖朝表面靠近和远离的移动幅度,被解读为表面的高度轮廓。在低偏压下,显微镜成像的是密集排布的能级上电子轨道的平均状态,即费米能级附近电子态的局域密度。由于涉及的距离极小,两个电极都需要极其稳定;只有这样,才能观察到与单个原子相对应的周期性结构。仅凭这种方法不具备化学特异性,无法识别表面存在的原子种类。

paragraphs.text: The gain medium of a laser is normally a material of controlled purity, size, concentration, and shape, which amplifies the beam by the process of stimulated emission described above. This material can be of any state: gas, liquid, solid, or plasma. The gain medium absorbs pump energy, which raises some electrons into higher energy quantum states. Particles can interact with light by either absorbing or emitting photons. Emission can be spontaneous or stimulated. In the latter case, the photon is emitted in the same direction as the light that is passing by. When the number of particles in one excited state exceeds the number of particles in some lower-energy state, population inversion is achieved. This situation results in light amplification from the atoms in excited states because there are more stimulated emissions than absorptions. Population inversion cannot occur in a two-level energy system: as the upper level is populated, the probability of stimulated emission increases. This prevents population inversion as the number of atoms transitioning from excited to relaxed states would be the same, deeming the process inefficient. Lasers instead use three-level or higher systems, where the additional energy level allows electrons to relax quickly and produce a consistent population inversion.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 激光的增益介质通常是一种在纯度、尺寸、浓度和形状上受到控制的材料,它通过上述受激辐射的过程来放大光束。这种材料可以是任何状态:气态、液态、固态或等离子态。增益介质吸收泵浦能量,使部分电子跃迁到更高能量的量子态。粒子可以通过吸收或发射光子的方式与光相互作用。光子的发射可以是自发的,也可以是受激的。在受激发射的情况下,发射出的光子与经过的光方向相同。当处于某一激发态的粒子数超过处于某一较低能态的粒子数时,就实现了粒子数反转。这种情形会使处于激发态的原子放大光,因为受激辐射多于吸收。粒子数反转无法在二能级系统中出现:随着上能级被粒子填充,受激辐射的概率也会增大。这会阻碍粒子数反转,因为从激发态跃迁回弛豫态的原子数量将与之相同,使该过程效率低下。因此,激光器改用三能级或更多能级的系统,其中额外的能级使电子能够快速弛豫,从而产生持续稳定的粒子数反转。

paragraphs.text: Despite much opposition, the view of continental drift gained support and a lively debate started between "drifters" or "mobilists" and "fixists". During the 1920s, 1930s and 1940s, the former reached important milestones proposing that convection currents might have driven the plate movements, and that spreading may have occurred below the sea within the oceanic crust. Concepts close to the elements of plate tectonics were proposed by geophysicists and geologists like Vening-Meinesz, Holmes, and Umbgrove. In 1941, Otto Ampferer described, in his publication "Thoughts on the motion picture of the Atlantic region", processes that anticipated seafloor spreading and subduction. One of the first pieces of geophysical evidence that was used to support the movement of lithospheric plates came from paleomagnetism. This is based on the fact that rocks of different ages show a variable magnetic field direction, evidenced by studies since the mid, nineteenth century. The magnetic north and south poles reverse through time, and, especially important in paleotectonic studies, the relative position of the magnetic north pole varies through time. Initially, during the first half of the twentieth century, the latter phenomenon was explained by introducing what was called "polar wander".
paragraphs.translation_zh: 尽管遭到诸多反对，大陆漂移的观点仍获得了支持，主张漂移的活动论者与固定论者之间展开了一场激烈的争论。在20世纪20年代、30年代和40年代，活动论者一方取得了重要进展，提出对流可能驱动了板块运动，而且海底洋壳内部可能发生过扩张。维宁·迈内斯、霍姆斯和翁布格罗韦等地球物理学家和地质学家提出了一些接近板块构造要素的概念。1941年，奥托·安普费雷尔在其著作《关于大西洋地区运动图景的思考》中描述了一些预示海底扩张和俯冲的过程。用于支持岩石圈板块运动的最早地球物理证据之一来自古地磁学。这一证据的依据在于：不同年代的岩石显示出不同的磁场方向，自19世纪中叶以来的研究已证实了这一点。地磁的南北极会随时间发生倒转；尤为重要的是，在古构造研究中，磁北极的相对位置也会随时间而变化。起初，在20世纪上半叶，磁北极位置变化这一现象是通过引入所谓的“极移”来解释的。

paragraphs.text: The gain medium of a laser is normally a material of controlled purity, size, concentration, and shape, which amplifies the beam by the process of stimulated emission described above. This material can be of any state: gas, liquid, solid, or plasma. The gain medium absorbs pump energy, which raises some electrons into higher energy quantum states. Particles can interact with light by either absorbing or emitting photons. Emission can be spontaneous or stimulated. In the latter case, the photon is emitted in the same direction as the light that is passing by. When the number of particles in one excited state exceeds the number of particles in some lower-energy state, population inversion is achieved. This situation results in light amplification from the atoms in excited states because there are more stimulated emissions than absorptions. Population inversion cannot occur in a two-level energy system: as the upper level is populated, the probability of stimulated emission increases. This prevents population inversion as the number of atoms transitioning from excited to relaxed states would be the same, deeming the process inefficient. Lasers instead use three-level or higher systems, where the additional energy level allows electrons to relax quickly and produce a consistent population inversion. A system with this property is called an optical amplifier.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 激光的增益介质通常是一种纯度、尺寸、浓度和形状都受到控制的材料，它通过前述的受激辐射过程来放大光束。这种材料可以处于任何状态：气态、液态、固态或等离子态。增益介质吸收泵浦能量，从而将一些电子激发到更高的能量量子态。粒子可以通过吸收或发射光子来与光相互作用。这种发射可以是自发的，也可以是受激的。在受激发射的情况下，光子的发射方向与经过的光的方向相同。当处于某一激发态的粒子数超过处于某一较低能态的粒子数时，就实现了粒子数反转。这种状况会使处于激发态的原子产生光放大，因为此时受激辐射多于吸收。粒子数反转无法在二能级系统中发生：随着高能级被填充，受激辐射的概率会增大。这会阻止粒子数反转，因为从激发态跃迁回弛豫态的原子数量将与之相同，从而使这一过程效率低下。因此，激光器改用三能级或更多能级的系统，其中额外的能级可让电子迅速弛豫，从而产生稳定的粒子数反转。具有这种特性的系统被称为光放大器。

paragraphs.text: Present-day climate change includes both global warming, the ongoing increase in global average temperature, and its wider effects on Earth's climate system. Climate change in a broader sense also includes previous long-term changes to Earth's climate. The modern-day rise in global temperatures is driven by human activities, especially fossil fuel burning since the Industrial Revolution. Fossil fuel use, deforestation, and some agricultural and industrial practices release greenhouse gases. These gases absorb some of the heat that the Earth radiates after it warms from sunlight, warming the lower atmosphere. Earth's atmosphere now has roughly 50% more carbon dioxide, the main gas driving global warming, than it did at the end of the pre-industrial era, reaching levels not seen for millions of years. Climate change has an increasingly large impact on the environment. Heat waves and wildfires are becoming more common. Amplified warming in the Arctic has contributed to thawing permafrost, retreat of glaciers and sea ice decline. Higher temperatures are also causing more intense storms, droughts, and other weather extremes. Rapid environmental change in mountains, coral reefs, and the Arctic is forcing many species to relocate or become extinct. Even if efforts to minimize future warming are successful, some effects will continue for centuries. These include ocean heating, ocean acidification and sea level rise. Climate change threatens people with increased flooding, extreme heat, increased food and water scarcity, more disease, and economic loss. Human migration and conflict can also be a result. The World Health Organization calls climate change one of the biggest threats to global health in the 21st century. Societies and ecosystems will experience more severe risks without action to limit warming.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 当今的气候变化既包括全球变暖，即全球平均气温的持续上升，也包括它对地球气候系统更广泛的影响。从更广义上说，气候变化还包括地球气候以往发生的长期变化。当代全球气温的上升是由人类活动驱动的，尤其是工业革命以来对化石燃料的燃烧。化石燃料的使用、森林砍伐以及某些农业和工业活动都会排放温室气体。地球受阳光照射升温后会向外辐射热量，这些气体吸收了其中一部分热量，从而使低层大气变暖。二氧化碳是驱动全球变暖的主要气体，如今地球大气中的二氧化碳含量比前工业时代末期约高出50%，达到了数百万年来未曾出现的水平。气候变化对环境的影响越来越大。热浪和野火正变得越来越常见。北极地区加剧的变暖促使永久冻土消融、冰川退缩以及海冰减少。气温升高还在引发更猛烈的风暴、干旱和其他极端天气。山地、珊瑚礁和北极地区的快速环境变化，正迫使许多物种迁移或走向灭绝。即使把未来变暖降到最低的努力取得成功，某些影响仍将持续数百年。这些影响包括海洋升温、海洋酸化和海平面上升。气候变化以更频繁的洪涝、极端高温、日益严重的粮食和水资源短缺、更多疾病以及经济损失威胁着人类。它还可能导致人口迁徙和冲突。世界卫生组织称气候变化是21世纪全球健康面临的最大威胁之一。如果不采取行动限制变暖，社会和生态系统将面临更为严峻的风险。

paragraphs.text: In the middle of the 17th century, a Flemish physician Jan Baptist van Helmont offered the first chemical account of digestion which was later described as being very close to the later conceptualised enzyme. In 1653, William Harvey described the intestines in terms of their length, their blood supply, the mesenteries, and fat. In 1823, William Prout discovered hydrochloric acid in the gastric juice. In 1895, Ivan Pavlov described its secretion as being stimulated by a neurologic reflex with the vagus nerve having a crucial role. Black in the 19th century suggested an association of histamine with this secretion. In 1916, Popielski described histamine as a gastric secretagogue of hydrochloric acid. William Beaumont was an army surgeon who in 1825, was able to observe digestion as it took place in the stomach. This was made possible by experiments on a man with a stomach wound that did not fully heal leaving an opening into the stomach. The churning motion of the stomach was described among other findings. In the 19th century, it was accepted that chemical processes were involved in the process of digestion.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 17世纪中叶，佛兰德医生扬·巴普蒂斯特·范·海尔蒙特首次从化学角度阐释了消化，这一阐释后来被认为与日后形成的酶的概念十分接近。1653年，威廉·哈维从长度、血液供应、肠系膜和脂肪等方面描述了肠道。1823年，威廉·普劳特在胃液中发现了盐酸。1895年，伊万·巴甫洛夫指出，胃液的分泌是由一种神经反射所激发的，其中迷走神经起着关键作用。19世纪，布莱克提出组胺与这种分泌有关。1916年，波皮耶尔斯基将组胺描述为一种促进胃部分泌盐酸的物质。威廉·博蒙特是一名军医，他于1825年得以观察到消化在胃中进行的过程。这得益于对一名胃部受伤者所做的实验，此人的伤口未能完全愈合，留下了一个通向胃部的开口。在诸多发现之中，胃部的搅动运动也得到了描述。到19世纪，人们已普遍接受消化过程涉及化学反应这一观点。

paragraphs.text: Despite much opposition, the view of continental drift gained support and a lively debate started between "drifters" or "mobilists" and "fixists". During the 1920s, 1930s and 1940s, the former reached important milestones proposing that convection currents might have driven the plate movements, and that spreading may have occurred below the sea within the oceanic crust. Concepts close to the elements of plate tectonics were proposed by geophysicists and geologists like Vening-Meinesz, Holmes, and Umbgrove. In 1941, Otto Ampferer described, in his publication "Thoughts on the motion picture of the Atlantic region", processes that anticipated seafloor spreading and subduction. One of the first pieces of geophysical evidence that was used to support the movement of lithospheric plates came from paleomagnetism. This is based on the fact that rocks of different ages show a variable magnetic field direction, evidenced by studies since the mid, nineteenth century. The magnetic north and south poles reverse through time, and, especially important in paleotectonic studies, the relative position of the magnetic north pole varies through time. Initially, during the first half of the twentieth century, the latter phenomenon was explained by introducing what was called "polar wander". An alternative explanation, though, was that the continents had moved relative to the north pole, and each continent, in fact, shows its own "polar wander path".
paragraphs.translation_zh: 尽管遭到诸多反对，大陆漂移的观点仍获得了支持，漂移派（或称活动派）与固定派之间展开了一场激烈的争论。在20世纪20、30和40年代，前者取得了重要进展，提出对流可能驱动了板块运动，而扩张可能发生在海底的洋壳之中。维宁-梅内斯、霍姆斯和翁布格罗夫等地球物理学家和地质学家，提出了接近板块构造要素的概念。1941年，奥托·安普费雷尔在其著作《关于大西洋地区动态图景的思考》中，描述了一些预见到海底扩张和俯冲的过程。最早用于支持岩石圈板块运动的地球物理证据之一来自古地磁学。这一证据基于这样一个事实：不同年代的岩石显示出不同的磁场方向，自19世纪中叶以来的研究已对此提供了佐证。地磁的南北极会随时间发生倒转，而在古构造研究中尤为重要的是，磁北极的相对位置也会随时间变化。起初，在20世纪上半叶，后一种现象是通过引入所谓的极移来解释的。不过，另一种解释认为，是大陆相对于北极发生了移动，而事实上，每个大陆都呈现出各自的极移路径。

paragraphs.text: There was legitimate concern from supporters of vaccination about its safety and efficacy, but this was overshadowed by general condemnation, particularly when legislation started to introduce compulsory vaccination. The reason for this was that vaccination was introduced before laboratory methods were developed to control its production and account for its failures. Vaccine was maintained initially through arm-to-arm transfer and later through production on the skin of animals, and bacteriological sterility was impossible. Further, identification methods for potential pathogens were not available until the late 19th to early 20th century. Diseases later shown to be caused by contaminated vaccine included erysipelas, tuberculosis, tetanus, and syphilis. This last, though rare, estimated at 750 cases in 100 million vaccinations, attracted particular attention. Much later, Charles Creighton, a leading medical opponent of vaccination, claimed that the vaccine itself was a cause of syphilis and devoted a book to the subject. As cases of smallpox started to occur in those who had been vaccinated earlier, supporters of vaccination pointed out that these were usually very mild and occurred years after the vaccination. In turn, opponents of vaccination pointed out that this contradicted Jenner's belief that vaccination conferred complete protection.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 疫苗接种的支持者对其安全性和有效性存在合理的担忧，但这种担忧被普遍的谴责所掩盖，尤其是在立法开始推行强制接种之时。造成这种情况的原因是，疫苗接种在尚未发展出实验室方法来控制其生产、解释其失败之前就已经推行了。疫苗起初通过手臂到手臂的接种来维持，后来则通过在动物皮肤上培育来生产，当时根本无法做到细菌学意义上的无菌。此外，直到19世纪末至20世纪初，人们才有了鉴别潜在病原体的方法。后来被证明由受污染疫苗引起的疾病包括丹毒、结核病、破伤风和梅毒。其中最后一种虽然罕见，据估计每一亿次接种约有750例，却引起了特别的关注。很久以后，反对疫苗接种的主要医学人士查尔斯·克赖顿声称疫苗本身就是梅毒的一个病因，并为此专门写了一本书。当先前接种过疫苗的人开始出现天花病例时，疫苗接种的支持者指出，这些病例通常都很轻微，而且发生在接种数年之后。反过来，疫苗接种的反对者则指出，这与詹纳所认为的接种能提供完全保护的观点相矛盾。

paragraphs.text: Structural proteins that bind DNA are well-understood examples of non-specific DNA-protein interactions. Within chromosomes, DNA is held in complexes with structural proteins. These proteins organize the DNA into a compact structure called chromatin. In eukaryotes, this structure involves DNA binding to a complex of small basic proteins called histones, while in prokaryotes multiple types of proteins are involved. The histones form a disk-shaped complex called a nucleosome, which contains two complete turns of double-stranded DNA wrapped around its surface. These non-specific interactions are formed through basic residues in the histones, making ionic bonds to the acidic sugar-phosphate backbone of the DNA, and are thus largely independent of the base sequence. Chemical modifications of these basic amino acid residues include methylation, phosphorylation, and acetylation. These chemical changes alter the strength of the interaction between the DNA and the histones, making the DNA more or less accessible to transcription factors and changing the rate of transcription. Other non-specific DNA-binding proteins in chromatin include the high-mobility group proteins, which bind to bent or distorted DNA. These proteins are important in bending arrays of nucleosomes and arranging them into the larger structures that make up chromosomes.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 与DNA结合的结构蛋白，是非特异性DNA-蛋白质相互作用中研究得较为透彻的例子。在染色体内，DNA与结构蛋白结合成复合物。这些蛋白把DNA组织成一种紧密的结构，称为染色质。在真核生物中，这种结构是DNA与一组称为组蛋白的小型碱性蛋白结合而成；而在原核生物中，则有多种类型的蛋白参与其中。组蛋白构成一种盘状复合物，称为核小体，其表面缠绕着两整圈双链DNA。这些非特异性相互作用通过组蛋白中的碱性残基形成，这些残基与DNA上酸性的糖-磷酸骨架结成离子键，因此基本上与碱基序列无关。对这些碱性氨基酸残基的化学修饰包括甲基化、磷酸化和乙酰化。这些化学变化会改变DNA与组蛋白之间相互作用的强度，使转录因子更容易或更难接近DNA，从而改变转录速率。染色质中其他非特异性的DNA结合蛋白还包括高迁移率族蛋白，它们与弯曲或扭曲的DNA结合。这些蛋白在弯折成排的核小体、并将其排列成构成染色体的更大结构方面起着重要作用。

paragraphs.text: Personality psychology is concerned with enduring patterns of behavior, thought, and emotion. Theories of personality vary across different psychological schools of thought. Each theory carries different assumptions about such features as the role of the unconscious and the importance of childhood experience. According to Freud, personality is based on the dynamic interactions of the id, ego, and super-ego. By contrast, trait theorists have developed taxonomies of personality constructs in describing personality in terms of key traits. Trait theorists have often employed statistical data-reduction methods, such as factor analysis. Although the number of proposed traits has varied widely, Hans Eysenck's early biologically based model suggests at least three major trait constructs are necessary to describe human personality: extraversion, introversion, neuroticism-stability, and psychoticism-normality. Raymond Cattell empirically derived a theory of 16 personality factors at the primary-factor level and up to eight broader second-stratum factors. Since the 1980s, the Big Five emerged as an important trait theory of personality. Dimensional models of personality disorders are receiving increasing support, and a version of dimensional assessment, namely the Alternative DSM-5 Model for Personality Disorders, has been included in the DSM-5.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 人格心理学关注行为、思维和情绪中持久稳定的模式。不同的心理学流派对人格有着各不相同的理论。每种理论对诸如潜意识的作用、童年经历的重要性等问题，都持有不同的假设。弗洛伊德认为，人格建立在本我、自我和超我之间动态相互作用的基础上。相比之下，特质论者通过若干关键特质来描述人格，并为各种人格构念建立了分类体系。特质论者常使用统计上的数据降维方法，例如因素分析。尽管学者们提出的特质数目相差很大，但汉斯·艾森克早期基于生物学的模型认为，要描述人类人格至少需要三大特质维度：外向与内向、神经质与稳定、以及精神质与常态。雷蒙德·卡特尔通过实证研究提出了一套理论，在基本因素层面包含16种人格因素，在更高的第二层面则多达八个较宽泛的因素。自20世纪80年代以来，大五人格逐渐成为一种重要的人格特质理论。人格障碍的维度模型正获得越来越多的支持，其中一种维度评估方案，即人格障碍的DSM-5替代模型，已被纳入DSM-5之中。

paragraphs.text: The universe comprises all of existence: all forms of matter and energy, and the structures they form, from sub-atomic particles to entire galactic filaments. Since the early 20th century, the field of cosmology has established that the universe has been expanding for 13. 8 billion years, starting from a dense fireball in an event called the Big Bang. The observable portion of the universe is approximately 93 billion light-years in diameter at present. The total size of the universe is not known. Some of the earliest cosmological models of the universe were geocentric, placing Earth at the center. During the Scientific Revolution, astronomical observations led to a heliocentric model. Further observational improvements led to the realization that the Sun is one of a few hundred billion stars in the Milky Way, which is one of a few hundred billion galaxies in the observable universe. At the largest scale, galaxies are distributed uniformly and the same in all directions. At smaller scales, galaxies are distributed in clusters and superclusters, which form immense filaments and voids in space, creating a vast foam-like structure. Discoveries in the early 20th century, including general relativity, led to the modern view of an expanding, isotropic, homogeneous universe. Evidence accumulated supporting the Big Bang theory: an initial hot fireball cooled and becoming less dense as the universe expanded, allowing the first subatomic particles and simple atoms to form. Giant clouds of hydrogen and helium were gradually drawn to the places where matter was most dense, forming the first galaxies, stars, and eventually, everything else.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 宇宙囊括了一切存在：各种形式的物质与能量，以及它们所构成的结构，小至亚原子粒子，大至整条星系纤维。自20世纪初以来，宇宙学已经确立，宇宙一直在不断膨胀。这一膨胀已持续约138亿年，始于一场名为大爆炸的事件中那个致密的火球。目前，可观测宇宙的直径约为930亿光年。宇宙的总体大小目前尚不可知。一些最早的宇宙模型是地心说的，把地球置于中心。在科学革命期间，天文观测促成了日心说模型的提出。随着观测手段不断改进，人们认识到太阳只是银河系数千亿颗恒星中的一颗，而银河系又只是可观测宇宙数千亿个星系中的一个。在最大的尺度上，星系的分布是均匀的，且在各个方向上都相同。在较小的尺度上，星系聚集成星系团和超星系团，它们在空间中形成巨大的纤维结构和空洞，构成一种宏大的泡沫状结构。20世纪初的一系列发现，包括广义相对论，催生了现代的宇宙观：一个不断膨胀、各向同性且均匀的宇宙。支持大爆炸理论的证据不断积累：随着宇宙膨胀，最初炽热的火球逐渐冷却、密度降低，使最早的亚原子粒子和简单原子得以形成。巨大的氢云和氦云逐渐被吸引到物质密度最高的地方，形成了最早的星系和恒星，并最终孕育出其余的一切。

paragraphs.text: Some psychologists study motivation, or the subject of why people or lower animals initiate a behavior at a particular time. It also involves studying why humans and lower animals continue or terminate a behavior. Psychologists such as William James initially used the term motivation to refer to intention, in a sense similar to the concept of will in European philosophy. With the steady rise of Darwinian and Freudian thinking, instinct also came to be seen as a primary source of motivation. According to drive theory, the forces of instinct combine into a single source of energy that exerts a constant influence. Psychoanalysis, like biology, regarded these forces as demands originating in the nervous system. Psychoanalysts believed that these forces, especially the sexual instincts, could become entangled and transmuted within the psyche. Classical psychoanalysis conceives of a struggle between the pleasure principle and the reality principle, roughly corresponding to the id and the ego. Later, in Beyond the Pleasure Principle, Freud introduced the concept of the death drive, a compulsion towards aggression, destruction, and psychic repetition of traumatic events. Meanwhile, behaviorist researchers used simple dichotomous models and well-established principles such as the idea that a thirsty creature will take pleasure in drinking.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 一些心理学家研究动机，即探讨人或低等动物为何会在某一特定时刻发起某种行为这一课题。这一研究还包括探讨人类和低等动物为何会持续或终止某种行为。威廉·詹姆斯等心理学家最初用“动机”一词来指意图，其含义类似于欧洲哲学中的意志概念。随着达尔文学说和弗洛伊德思想的稳步兴起，本能也开始被视为动机的一个主要来源。根据驱力理论，各种本能的力量汇聚成单一的能量源，持续地施加影响。精神分析学与生物学一样，将这些力量视为源自神经系统的需求。精神分析学家认为，这些力量，尤其是性本能，可能在心灵中相互纠缠并发生转化。经典精神分析学设想了快乐原则与现实原则之间的斗争，二者大致对应于本我和自我。后来，弗洛伊德在《超越快乐原则》中提出了死亡驱力的概念，即一种趋向攻击、毁灭以及在心理上重复创伤事件的冲动。与此同时，行为主义研究者则使用简单的二分模型和一些公认的原理，比如口渴的生物会从饮水中获得快感这一观点。

paragraphs.text: For well-understood faults the probability that a segment may rupture during the next few decades can be estimated. The objective of earthquake engineering is to foresee the impact of earthquakes on buildings, bridges, tunnels, roadways, and other structures, and to design such structures to minimize the risk of damage. Existing structures can be modified by seismic retrofitting to improve their resistance to earthquakes. Earthquake insurance can provide building owners with financial protection against losses resulting from earthquakes. Emergency management strategies can be employed by a government or organization to mitigate risks and prepare for consequences. Artificial intelligence may help to assess buildings and plan precautionary operations. The Igor expert system is part of a mobile laboratory that supports the procedures leading to the seismic assessment of masonry buildings and the planning of retrofitting operations on them. Individuals can also take preparedness steps like securing water heaters and heavy items that could injure someone, locating shutoffs for utilities, and being educated about what to do when the shaking starts. For areas near large bodies of water, earthquake preparedness encompasses the possibility of a tsunami caused by a large earthquake.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 对于研究得较为透彻的断层，可以估算出其某一段在未来几十年内发生破裂的概率。地震工程的目标是预见地震对建筑物、桥梁、隧道、道路及其他结构的影响，并通过设计这些结构来把受损风险降到最低。对于既有结构，可以通过抗震加固加以改造，以提高其抗震能力。地震保险可以为业主提供经济保障，以应对地震造成的损失。政府或机构可以采取应急管理策略，以降低风险并为可能的后果做好准备。人工智能或许有助于评估建筑物并规划预防性措施。Igor专家系统是一座移动实验室的组成部分，可为砌体建筑的抗震评估以及加固施工的规划提供流程支持。个人也可以采取一些防备措施，比如固定好热水器和可能伤人的重物，弄清水电气等设施的关闭阀门所在位置，并了解在地面开始震动时该怎么做。对于临近大片水域的地区，地震防备还要考虑大地震引发海啸的可能性。

paragraphs.text: Proteins are assembled from amino acids using information encoded in genes. Each protein has its own unique amino acid sequence that is specified by the nucleotide sequence of the gene encoding this protein. The genetic code is a set of three-nucleotide sets called codons and each three-nucleotide combination designates an amino acid, for example AUG is the code for methionine. Because DNA contains four nucleotides, the total number of possible codons is 64; hence, there is some redundancy in the genetic code, with some amino acids specified by more than one codon. Genes encoded in DNA are first transcribed into pre-messenger RNA by proteins such as RNA polymerase. Most organisms then process the pre-mRNA using various forms of post-transcriptional modification to form the mature mRNA, which is then used as a template for protein synthesis by the ribosome. In prokaryotes the mRNA may either be used as soon as it is produced, or be bound by a ribosome after having moved away from the nucleoid. In contrast, eukaryotes make mRNA in the cell nucleus and then translocate it across the nuclear membrane into the cytoplasm, where protein synthesis then takes place.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 蛋白质是利用基因中编码的信息，由氨基酸组装而成的。每种蛋白质都有自己独特的氨基酸序列，这一序列由编码该蛋白质的基因的核苷酸序列所决定。遗传密码是一组由三个核苷酸构成的单元，称为密码子，每一种三核苷酸组合指定一种氨基酸，例如AUG是甲硫氨酸的密码。由于DNA含有四种核苷酸，可能的密码子总数为64个；因此遗传密码存在一定的冗余，有些氨基酸由不止一个密码子指定。编码在DNA中的基因首先在RNA聚合酶等蛋白质的作用下转录为前体信使RNA。随后，大多数生物体通过各种形式的转录后修饰来加工前体mRNA，形成成熟的mRNA，再由核糖体以其为模板进行蛋白质合成。在原核生物中，mRNA可能一经产生就被使用，也可能在离开拟核之后被核糖体结合。相比之下，真核生物在细胞核内生成mRNA，然后将其跨过核膜转运到细胞质中，蛋白质合成便在那里进行。

paragraphs.text: The water cycle is a biogeochemical cycle that involves the continuous change in form of water on, above and below the surface of the Earth across different reservoirs. The mass of water on Earth remains fairly constant over time. However, the partitioning of the water into the major reservoirs of ice, fresh water, salt water and atmospheric water is variable and depends on climatic variables. The water moves from one reservoir to another, such as from river to ocean, or from the ocean to the atmosphere due to a variety of physical and chemical processes. The processes that drive these movements, or fluxes, are evaporation, transpiration, condensation, precipitation, sublimation, infiltration, surface runoff, and subsurface flow. In doing so, the water goes through different phases: liquid, solid and vapor. The ocean plays a key role in the water cycle as it is the source of 86% of global evaporation. The water cycle is driven by energy exchanges in the form of heat transfers between different phases. The energy released or absorbed during a phase change can result in temperature changes. Heat is absorbed as water transitions from the liquid to the vapor phase through evaporation. This heat is also known as the latent heat of vaporization. Conversely, when water condenses or melts from solid ice it releases energy and heat. On a global scale, water plays a critical role in transferring heat from the tropics to the poles via ocean circulation. The evaporative phase of the cycle also acts as a purification process by separating water molecules from salts and other particles that are present in its liquid phase. The condensation phase in the atmosphere replenishes the land with freshwater. The flow of liquid water transports minerals across the globe. It also reshapes the geological features of the Earth, through processes of weathering, erosion, and deposition. The water cycle is also essential for the maintenance of most life and ecosystems on the planet. Human actions are greatly affecting the water cycle. Activities such as deforestation, urbanization, and the extraction of groundwater are altering natural landscapes all have an effect on the water cycle. On top of this, climate change is leading to an intensification of the water cycle. Research has shown that global warming is causing shifts in precipitation patterns, increased frequency of extreme weather events, and changes in the timing and intensity of rainfall.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 水循环是一种生物地球化学循环,它涉及水在地球表面、地表之上和地表之下的不同储库之间,形态不断发生变化。地球上水的总质量随时间推移基本保持恒定。然而,水在冰、淡水、咸水和大气水这几大储库之间的分配是可变的,取决于各种气候要素。由于各种物理和化学过程,水会从一个储库转移到另一个储库,例如从河流流向海洋,或从海洋进入大气。驱动这些移动也就是通量的过程,包括蒸发、蒸腾、凝结、降水、升华、下渗、地表径流和地下径流。在此过程中,水会经历不同的相态:液态、固态和气态。海洋在水循环中起着关键作用,因为全球百分之八十六的蒸发都来自海洋。水循环由能量交换驱动,这种能量交换以不同相态之间热量传递的形式进行。相变过程中释放或吸收的能量可以引起温度的变化。当水通过蒸发从液态转变为气态时,会吸收热量。这种热量也被称为汽化潜热。反过来,当水凝结、或由固态冰融化时,则会释放出能量和热量。在全球尺度上,水通过海洋环流将热量从热带输送到两极,发挥着至关重要的作用。水循环中的蒸发阶段还起到净化作用,它把水分子与液态时所含的盐分和其他颗粒分离开来。大气中的凝结阶段为陆地补充了淡水。液态水的流动将矿物质输送到全球各地。液态水的流动还通过风化、侵蚀和沉积等过程,重新塑造着地球的地质地貌。水循环对于维持地球上大多数生命和生态系统也必不可少。人类活动正在极大地影响着水循环。砍伐森林、城市化以及抽取地下水等活动正在改变自然地貌,这些都会对水循环产生影响。不仅如此,气候变化还正在导致水循环加剧。研究表明,全球变暖正在引起降水模式的改变、极端天气事件频率的增加,以及降雨发生时间和强度的变化。

paragraphs.text: The immune system is a network of biological systems that protects an organism from diseases. It detects and responds to a wide variety of pathogens, such as viruses, bacteria, and parasites, as well as cancer cells and foreign objects, such as wood splinters, distinguishing them from the organism's own healthy tissue. Many species have two major subsystems of the immune system. The innate immune system provides a preconfigured response to broad groups of situations and stimuli. The adaptive immune system provides a tailored response to each stimulus by learning to recognize molecules it has previously encountered. Both use molecules and cells to perform their functions. Nearly all organisms have some kind of immune system. Bacteria have a rudimentary immune system in the form of enzymes that protect against viral infections. Other basic immune mechanisms evolved in ancient plants and animals and remain in their modern descendants. These mechanisms include phagocytosis, antimicrobial peptides called defensins, RNA interference, and the complement system. Jawed vertebrates, including humans, have a more sophisticated defense mechanism. For example, adaptive immunity provides the ability to adapt to recognize pathogens more efficiently. This process creates an immunological memory, resulting in an enhanced response against subsequent encounters with that same pathogen. This mechanism of adaptive immunity is the fundamental basis of vaccination. Dysfunction of the immune system can cause autoimmune diseases, inflammatory diseases and cancer. Immunodeficiency occurs when the immune system is less active than normal, resulting in recurring and life-threatening infections. In humans, immunodeficiency can be the result of a genetic disease such as severe combined immunodeficiency, acquired conditions such as HIV/AIDS, or the use of immunosuppressive medication. Autoimmunity results from a hyperactive immune system attacking normal tissues as if they were foreign organisms. Common autoimmune diseases include Hashimoto's thyroiditis, rheumatoid arthritis, diabetes mellitus type 1, and systemic lupus erythematosus. Immunology covers the study of all aspects of the immune system. The immune system protects its host from infection with layered defenses of increasing specificity. Physical barriers prevent pathogens such as bacteria and viruses from entering the organism. If a pathogen breaches these barriers, the innate immune system provides an immediate, but non-specific response. Innate immune systems are found in all animals. If pathogens successfully evade the innate response, vertebrates possess a second layer of protection, the adaptive immune system, which is activated by the innate response.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 免疫系统是由多个生物系统构成的网络,用于保护生物体免受疾病侵害。免疫系统能够检测并应对多种多样的病原体,例如病毒、细菌和寄生虫,以及癌细胞和异物(如木刺),并将它们与生物体自身的健康组织区分开来。许多物种的免疫系统都包含两大子系统。先天免疫系统针对大类的情况和刺激提供预先设定好的应答。适应性免疫系统则通过学习识别此前接触过的分子,针对每一种刺激提供量身定制的应答。这两个系统都借助分子和细胞来发挥各自的功能。几乎所有生物都拥有某种形式的免疫系统。细菌拥有一种以酶为形式的初级免疫系统,用于抵御病毒感染。其他一些基本的免疫机制在古代植物和动物中演化形成,并保留在它们现代后代的体内。这些机制包括吞噬作用、被称为防御素的抗菌肽、核糖核酸干扰,以及补体系统。包括人类在内的有颌脊椎动物,拥有更为复杂精密的防御机制。例如,适应性免疫提供了一种能力,使机体能够通过适应来更高效地识别病原体。这一过程会形成免疫记忆,从而在日后再次遇到同一病原体时产生更强的应答。适应性免疫的这一机制是疫苗接种的根本基础。免疫系统功能失调可引发自身免疫病、炎症性疾病和癌症。当免疫系统的活性低于正常水平时,就会出现免疫缺陷,导致反复发作且危及生命的感染。在人类中,免疫缺陷可能源于遗传性疾病(如重症联合免疫缺陷)、后天获得的疾病(如人类免疫缺陷病毒感染或艾滋病),或使用免疫抑制类药物。自身免疫源于免疫系统过度活跃,把正常组织当作外来生物加以攻击。常见的自身免疫病包括桥本甲状腺炎、类风湿关节炎、1型糖尿病和系统性红斑狼疮。免疫学涵盖对免疫系统各个方面的研究。免疫系统通过特异性逐层递增的分层防御,保护宿主免受感染。物理屏障可阻止细菌和病毒等病原体进入生物体。如果病原体突破了这些屏障,先天免疫系统会立即作出反应,但这种反应不具特异性。所有动物体内都存在先天免疫系统。如果病原体成功躲过先天免疫应答,脊椎动物还拥有第二层防护,即由先天免疫应答所激活的适应性免疫系统。

paragraphs.text: Many species have two major subsystems of the immune system. The innate immune system provides a preconfigured response to broad groups of situations and stimuli. The adaptive immune system provides a tailored response to each stimulus by learning to recognize molecules it has previously encountered. Both use molecules and cells to perform their functions. Nearly all organisms have some kind of immune system. Bacteria have a rudimentary immune system in the form of enzymes that protect against viral infections. Other basic immune mechanisms evolved in ancient plants and animals and remain in their modern descendants. These mechanisms include phagocytosis, antimicrobial peptides called defensins, RNA interference, and the complement system. Jawed vertebrates, including humans, have a more sophisticated defense mechanism. For example, adaptive immunity provides the ability to adapt to recognize pathogens more efficiently. This process creates an immunological memory, resulting in an enhanced response against subsequent encounters with that same pathogen. This mechanism of adaptive immunity is the fundamental basis of vaccination. Dysfunction of the immune system can cause autoimmune diseases, inflammatory diseases and cancer. Immunodeficiency occurs when the immune system is less active than normal, resulting in recurring and life-threatening infections. In humans, immunodeficiency can be the result of a genetic disease such as severe combined immunodeficiency, acquired conditions such as HIV/AIDS, or the use of immunosuppressive medication. Autoimmunity results from a hyperactive immune system attacking normal tissues as if they were foreign organisms. Common autoimmune diseases include Hashimoto's thyroiditis, rheumatoid arthritis, diabetes mellitus type 1, and systemic lupus erythematosus. Immunology covers the study of all aspects of the immune system. The immune system protects its host from infection with layered defenses of increasing specificity. Physical barriers prevent pathogens such as bacteria and viruses from entering the organism. If a pathogen breaches these barriers, the innate immune system provides an immediate, but non-specific response. Innate immune systems are found in all animals. If pathogens successfully evade the innate response, vertebrates possess a second layer of protection, the adaptive immune system, which is activated by the innate response. Here, the immune system adapts its response during an infection to improve its recognition of the pathogen. Both innate and adaptive immunity depend on the ability of the immune system to distinguish between self and non-self molecules. In immunology, self molecules are components of an organism's body that can be distinguished from foreign substances by the immune system.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 许多物种的免疫系统都包含两大子系统。先天免疫系统针对各大类情形和刺激提供预先设定好的反应。适应性免疫系统通过学习识别此前遇到过的分子，针对每一种刺激提供量身定制的反应。这两个系统都借助分子和细胞来发挥各自的功能。几乎所有生物都具有某种免疫系统。细菌拥有一种以酶为形式的初级免疫系统，可抵御病毒感染。其他一些基本的免疫机制在远古的植物和动物中演化出来，并保留在它们今天的后代体内。这些机制包括吞噬作用、被称为防御素的抗菌肽、核糖核酸干扰以及补体系统。包括人类在内的有颌脊椎动物拥有更为复杂的防御机制。例如，适应性免疫赋予机体不断调整、更高效地识别病原体的能力。这一过程会形成免疫记忆，使机体在日后再次遇到同一病原体时作出更强的反应。适应性免疫的这一机制是疫苗接种的根本基础。免疫系统功能失调可引发自身免疫病、炎症性疾病和癌症。当免疫系统的活性低于正常水平时，就会出现免疫缺陷，导致反复发作且危及生命的感染。在人类中，免疫缺陷可能源于重症联合免疫缺陷之类的遗传病、艾滋病之类的后天疾病，或免疫抑制药物的使用。自身免疫源于过度活跃的免疫系统，它会把正常组织当作外来生物加以攻击。常见的自身免疫病包括桥本甲状腺炎、类风湿关节炎、1型糖尿病和系统性红斑狼疮。免疫学涵盖对免疫系统各个方面的研究。免疫系统通过特异性逐层递增的防御来保护宿主免受感染。物理屏障阻止细菌和病毒等病原体进入机体。如果病原体突破了这些屏障，先天免疫系统会作出即时但非特异性的反应。所有动物都具有先天免疫系统。如果病原体成功躲过先天免疫反应，脊椎动物还拥有第二层防护，即适应性免疫系统，它由先天免疫反应所激活。在这一层防护中，免疫系统会在感染过程中不断调整反应，以提高对病原体的识别能力。先天免疫和适应性免疫都依赖于免疫系统区分自身分子与非自身分子的能力。在免疫学中，自身分子是指生物体自身的组成成分，免疫系统能够将它们与外来物质区分开来。

paragraphs.text: Innate lymphoid cells are a group of innate immune cells that are derived from common lymphoid progenitor and belong to the lymphoid lineage. These cells are defined by the absence of antigen-specific B- or T-cell receptor because of the lack of recombination activating gene. ILCs do not express myeloid or dendritic cell markers. Natural killer cells are lymphocytes and a component of the innate immune system that does not directly attack invading microbes. Rather, NK cells destroy compromised host cells, such as tumor cells or virus-infected cells, recognizing such cells by a condition known as "missing self". This term describes cells with low levels of a cell-surface marker called MHC I, a situation that can arise in viral infections of host cells. Normal body cells are not recognized and attacked by NK cells because they express intact self MHC antigens. Those MHC antigens are recognized by killer cell immunoglobulin receptors, which essentially put the brakes on NK cells. Inflammation is one of the first responses of the immune system to infection. The symptoms of inflammation are redness, swelling, heat, and pain, which are caused by increased blood flow into tissue. Inflammation is produced by eicosanoids and cytokines, which are released by injured or infected cells. Eicosanoids include prostaglandins that produce fever and the dilation of blood vessels associated with inflammation and leukotrienes that attract certain white blood cells. Common cytokines include interleukins that are responsible for communication between white blood cells; chemokines that promote chemotaxis; and interferons that have antiviral effects, such as shutting down protein synthesis in the host cell. Growth factors and cytotoxic factors may also be released. These cytokines and other chemicals recruit immune cells to the site of infection and promote the healing of any damaged tissue following the removal of pathogens. The complement system is a biochemical cascade that attacks the surfaces of foreign cells. It contains over 20 different proteins and is named for its ability to "complement" the killing of pathogens by antibodies. Complement is the major humoral component of the innate immune response. Many species have complement systems, including non-mammals like plants, fish, and some invertebrates. In humans, this response is activated by complement binding to antibodies that have attached to these microbes or the binding of complement proteins to carbohydrates on the surfaces of microbes.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 先天淋巴样细胞是一类先天免疫细胞，它们来源于共同淋巴样祖细胞，属于淋巴细胞谱系。这类细胞的特征是缺乏抗原特异性的B细胞或T细胞受体，因为它们没有重组激活基因。先天淋巴样细胞不表达髓系细胞或树突状细胞的标志物。自然杀伤细胞是一种淋巴细胞，也是先天免疫系统的组成部分，但它并不直接攻击入侵的微生物。相反，自然杀伤细胞会摧毁受损的宿主细胞，例如肿瘤细胞或被病毒感染的细胞，并通过一种称为缺失自我的状态来识别这些细胞。这个术语指的是细胞表面一种名为MHC I的标志物水平偏低的细胞，这种情况可能出现在宿主细胞遭病毒感染时。正常的体细胞由于表达完整的自身MHC抗原，因而不会被自然杀伤细胞识别和攻击。这些MHC抗原会被杀伤细胞免疫球蛋白受体识别，而这类受体实质上对自然杀伤细胞起到了制动作用。炎症是免疫系统对感染最早作出的反应之一。炎症的症状是红、肿、热、痛，它们由流入组织的血液增多所引起。炎症由类二十烷酸和细胞因子引发，这些物质由受损或受感染的细胞释放。类二十烷酸包括引起发热和炎症相关血管扩张的前列腺素，以及吸引某些白细胞的白三烯。常见的细胞因子包括：负责白细胞之间通讯的白细胞介素；促进趋化作用的趋化因子；以及具有抗病毒作用的干扰素，例如关闭宿主细胞内的蛋白质合成。此外还可能释放生长因子和细胞毒性因子。这些细胞因子和其他化学物质会把免疫细胞招募到感染部位，并在清除病原体之后促进受损组织的愈合。补体系统是一种生化级联反应，会攻击外来细胞的表面。它包含20多种不同的蛋白质，其名称源于它能够补充抗体杀灭病原体的作用。补体是先天免疫应答中主要的体液成分。许多物种都拥有补体系统，包括植物、鱼类和某些无脊椎动物等非哺乳动物。在人体中，这一反应通过两种方式激活：补体与已附着在微生物上的抗体结合，或补体蛋白与微生物表面的碳水化合物结合。

paragraphs.text: About half of the mutations in the coding regions of protein-coding genes are deleterious, the other half are neutral. A small percentage of the total mutations in this region confer a fitness benefit. Some of the mutations in other parts of the genome are deleterious but the vast majority are neutral. Mutations can involve large sections of a chromosome becoming duplicated, which can introduce extra copies of a gene into a genome. Extra copies of genes are a major source of the raw material needed for new genes to evolve. This is important because most new genes evolve within gene families from pre-existing genes that share common ancestors. For example, the human eye uses four genes to make structures that sense light: three for colour vision and one for night vision; all four are descended from a single ancestral gene. New genes can be generated from an ancestral gene when a duplicate copy mutates and acquires a new function. Other types of mutations can even generate entirely new genes from previously noncoding DNA, a phenomenon termed de novo gene birth. The generation of new genes can also involve small parts of several genes being duplicated, with these fragments then recombining to form new combinations with new functions. When new genes are assembled from shuffling pre-existing parts, domains act as modules with simple independent functions, which can be mixed together to produce new combinations with new and complex functions. For example, polyketide synthases are large enzymes that make antibiotics; they contain up to 100 independent domains that each catalyse one step in the overall process, like a step in an assembly line. One example of mutation is wild boar piglets. They are camouflage coloured and show a characteristic pattern of dark and light longitudinal stripes. However, mutations in the melanocortin 1 receptor disrupt the pattern. The majority of pig breeds carry MC1R mutations disrupting wild-type colour and different mutations causing dominant black colouring. In asexual organisms, genes are inherited together, or linked, as they cannot mix with genes of other organisms during reproduction. In contrast, the offspring of sexual organisms contain random mixtures of their parents' chromosomes that are produced through independent assortment. In a related process called homologous recombination, sexual organisms exchange DNA between two matching chromosomes. Recombination and reassortment do not alter allele frequencies, but instead change which alleles are associated with each other, producing offspring with new combinations of alleles.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 在蛋白质编码基因的编码区中，大约一半的突变是有害的，另一半则是中性的。该区域全部突变中只有一小部分能带来适应度上的好处。基因组其他部位的突变中有一些是有害的，但绝大多数是中性的。突变可能导致染色体上的大片段发生重复，从而把某个基因的额外拷贝引入基因组。基因的额外拷贝是新基因演化所需原材料的一个重要来源。这一点很重要，因为大多数新基因都是在基因家族内部、由具有共同祖先的已有基因演化而来的。例如，人眼用四个基因来构建感光结构：三个用于色觉，一个用于夜视，这四个基因全都源自同一个祖先基因。当一个复制拷贝发生突变并获得新功能时，就能从祖先基因产生出新的基因。其他类型的突变甚至能从原本不编码的脱氧核糖核酸中产生全新的基因，这种现象被称为基因从头诞生。新基因的产生还可能涉及若干基因的小片段被复制，随后这些片段重新组合，形成具有新功能的新组合。当新基因由已有部件重新洗牌组装而成时，结构域便充当具有简单独立功能的模块，它们可以混合搭配，产生具备全新复杂功能的新组合。例如，聚酮合酶是制造抗生素的大型酶，它们含有多达100个独立的结构域，每个结构域催化整个过程中的一个步骤，就像流水线上的一道工序。突变的一个例子是野猪幼崽。野猪幼崽具有伪装色，身上呈现出深浅相间的纵向条纹这一典型图案。然而，黑皮质素1受体基因的突变会破坏这种图案。大多数猪种都携带黑皮质素1受体基因的突变，这些突变破坏了野生型毛色，而不同的突变则导致显性的黑色毛色。在无性生殖的生物中，基因是一起遗传的，即彼此连锁，因为它们在繁殖时无法与其他生物的基因混合。相比之下，有性生殖生物的后代则含有通过自由组合产生的、父母双方染色体的随机混合。在一个称为同源重组的相关过程中，有性生殖生物会在两条相互匹配的染色体之间交换脱氧核糖核酸。重组和重新组合并不会改变等位基因的频率，而是改变哪些等位基因彼此关联，从而产生具有等位基因新组合的后代。

paragraphs.text: Photosynthesis is a system of biological processes by which photopigment-bearing autotrophic organisms, such as most plants, algae and cyanobacteria, convert light energy, typically from sunlight, into the chemical energy necessary to fuel their metabolism. The term photosynthesis usually refers to oxygenic photosynthesis, a process that releases oxygen as a byproduct of water splitting. Photosynthetic organisms store the converted chemical energy within the bonds of intracellular organic compounds, typically carbohydrates like sugars, starches, phytoglycogen and cellulose. When needing to use this stored energy, an organism's cells then metabolize the organic compounds through cellular respiration. Photosynthesis plays a critical role in producing and maintaining the oxygen content of the Earth's atmosphere, and it supplies most of the biological energy necessary for complex life on Earth. Some organisms also perform anoxygenic photosynthesis, which does not produce oxygen. Some bacteria use bacteriochlorophyll to split hydrogen sulfide as a reductant instead of water, releasing sulfur instead of oxygen, which was a dominant form of photosynthesis in the euxinic Canfield oceans during the Boring Billion. Such archaeal photosynthesis might have been the earliest form of photosynthesis that evolved on Earth, as far back as the Paleoarchean, preceding that of cyanobacteria. While the details may differ between species, the process always begins when light energy is absorbed by the reaction centers, proteins that contain photosynthetic pigments or chromophores. In plants, these pigments are chlorophylls held inside chloroplasts, abundant in leaf cells. In cyanobacteria, they are embedded in the plasma membrane. In these light-dependent reactions, some energy is used to strip electrons from suitable substances, such as water, producing oxygen gas. The hydrogen freed by the splitting of water is used in the creation of two important molecules that participate in energetic processes: reduced nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide phosphate and ATP. In plants, algae, and cyanobacteria, sugars are synthesized by a subsequent sequence of light-independent reactions called the Calvin cycle. In this process, atmospheric carbon dioxide is incorporated into already existing organic compounds, such as ribulose bisphosphate. Using the ATP and NADPH produced by the light-dependent reactions, the resulting compounds are then reduced and removed to form further carbohydrates, such as glucose. In other bacteria, different mechanisms like the reverse Krebs cycle are used to achieve the same end. The first photosynthetic organisms probably evolved early in the evolutionary history of life using reducing agents such as hydrogen or hydrogen sulfide, rather than water, as sources of electrons.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 光合作用是一系列生物过程的总和，含有光合色素的自养生物，如大多数植物、藻类和蓝细菌，借助这些过程将通常来自阳光的光能转化为维持自身代谢所需的化学能。光合作用一词通常指产氧光合作用，这一过程会在分解水的同时释放出氧气作为副产物。进行光合作用的生物将转化得到的化学能储存在细胞内有机化合物的化学键中，这些化合物通常是糖、淀粉、植物糖原和纤维素等碳水化合物。当需要利用这些储存的能量时，生物的细胞便通过细胞呼吸来代谢这些有机化合物。光合作用在产生并维持地球大气含氧量方面起着关键作用，它还为地球上的复杂生命提供了大部分必需的生物能量。有些生物还会进行不产氧光合作用，这种作用不产生氧气。有些细菌利用细菌叶绿素以硫化氢而非水作为还原剂进行分解，释放出的是硫而不是氧，在“无聊的十亿年”期间，这种光合作用是缺氧富硫的坎菲尔德海洋中占主导地位的形式。这种古菌的光合作用可能是地球上最早演化出的光合作用形式，最早可追溯到古太古代，早于蓝细菌的光合作用。尽管不同物种的细节可能有所不同，但这一过程总是始于反应中心吸收光能，反应中心是一类含有光合色素或发色团的蛋白质。在植物中，这些色素是存在于叶绿体内的叶绿素，叶绿体在叶片细胞中含量丰富。在蓝细菌中，这些色素则嵌在细胞质膜上。在这些光依赖反应中，一部分能量被用来从水等合适的物质中夺取电子，从而产生氧气。分解水所释放出的氢被用于生成两种参与能量过程的重要分子：还原型烟酰胺腺嘌呤二核苷酸磷酸和三磷酸腺苷。在植物、藻类和蓝细菌中，糖类是通过随后一系列被称为卡尔文循环的非光依赖反应合成的。在这一过程中，大气中的二氧化碳被固定到已有的有机化合物中，例如核酮糖二磷酸。利用光依赖反应产生的三磷酸腺苷和还原型烟酰胺腺嘌呤二核苷酸磷酸，所生成的化合物随后被还原并移出，形成葡萄糖等更复杂的碳水化合物。在其他一些细菌中，则采用诸如逆向克雷布斯循环之类的不同机制来达到同样的目的。最早进行光合作用的生物很可能在生命演化史的早期就已出现，它们使用氢或硫化氢等还原剂、而非水作为电子的来源。

paragraphs.text: Sex usually increases genetic variation and may increase the rate of evolution. The first cost is that in sexually dimorphic species only one of the two sexes can bear young. This cost does not apply to hermaphroditic species, like most plants and many invertebrates. The second cost is that any individual who reproduces sexually can only pass on 50% of its genes to any individual offspring, with even less passed on as each new generation passes. Yet sexual reproduction is the more common means of reproduction among eukaryotes and multicellular organisms. The Red Queen hypothesis has been used to explain the significance of sexual reproduction as a means to enable continual evolution and adaptation in response to coevolution with other species in an ever-changing environment. Another hypothesis is that sexual reproduction is primarily an adaptation for promoting accurate recombinational repair of damage in germline DNA, and that increased diversity is a byproduct of this process that may sometimes be adaptively beneficial. Gene flow is the exchange of genes between populations and between species. It can therefore be a source of variation that is new to a population or to a species. Gene transfer between species includes the formation of hybrid organisms and horizontal gene transfer. Horizontal gene transfer is the transfer of genetic material from one organism to another organism that is not its offspring; this is most common among bacteria. In medicine, this contributes to the spread of antibiotic resistance, as when one bacteria acquires resistance genes it can rapidly transfer them to other species. Horizontal transfer of genes from bacteria to eukaryotes such as the yeast Saccharomyces cerevisiae and the adzuki bean weevil Callosobruchus chinensis has occurred. An example of larger-scale transfers are the eukaryotic bdelloid rotifers, which have received a range of genes from bacteria, fungi and plants. Viruses can also carry DNA between organisms, allowing transfer of genes even across biological domains. Large-scale gene transfer has also occurred between the ancestors of eukaryotic cells and bacteria, during the acquisition of chloroplasts and mitochondria. It is possible that eukaryotes themselves originated from horizontal gene transfers between bacteria and archaea. Some heritable changes cannot be explained by changes to the sequence of nucleotides in the DNA. These phenomena are classed as epigenetic inheritance systems. DNA methylation marking chromatin, self-sustaining metabolic loops, gene silencing by RNA interference and the three-dimensional conformation of proteins are areas where epigenetic inheritance systems have been discovered at the organismic level.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 有性生殖通常会增加遗传变异，并可能加快进化的速度。有性生殖的第一个代价是，在雌雄异形的物种中，两性中只有一方能够生育后代。这一代价不适用于雌雄同体的物种，比如大多数植物和许多无脊椎动物。第二个代价是，任何进行有性生殖的个体只能将自身50%的基因传给每一个后代，而且随着一代代繁衍下去，传递的比例还会更低。然而，有性生殖却是真核生物和多细胞生物中更为常见的繁殖方式。红皇后假说被用来解释有性生殖的意义，认为它能使生物在不断变化的环境中、在与其他物种协同进化的过程中持续进化和适应。另一种假说认为，有性生殖主要是一种促进对生殖细胞系DNA损伤进行精确重组修复的适应机制，而多样性的增加只是这一过程的副产品，有时可能在适应上带来益处。基因流是种群之间以及物种之间的基因交换。因此，基因流可以成为种群或物种获得新变异的来源。物种间的基因转移包括杂交生物的形成和水平基因转移。水平基因转移是指遗传物质从一个生物体转移到另一个并非其后代的生物体，这种现象在细菌中最为常见。在医学领域，这种转移助长了抗生素耐药性的传播，因为当一种细菌获得耐药基因后，它能迅速将这些基因转移给其他物种。从细菌到真核生物的基因水平转移确实发生过，比如转移到酿酒酵母和绿豆象这类真核生物身上。更大规模转移的一个例子是真核的蛭形轮虫，它们从细菌、真菌和植物那里获得了一系列基因。病毒也能在生物体之间携带DNA，从而使基因甚至能够跨越生物界域进行转移。在获得叶绿体和线粒体的过程中，真核细胞的祖先与细菌之间也发生过大规模的基因转移。真核生物本身有可能就起源于细菌与古菌之间的水平基因转移。有些可遗传的变化无法用DNA中核苷酸序列的改变来解释。这些现象被归类为表观遗传系统。标记染色质的DNA甲基化、自我维持的代谢循环、由RNA干扰引起的基因沉默以及蛋白质的三维构象，都是已在生物个体层面发现表观遗传系统的领域。

paragraphs.text: The thylakoid itself is enclosed by the thylakoid membrane, and within the enclosed volume is a lumen or thylakoid space. Embedded in the thylakoid membrane are integral and peripheral membrane protein complexes of the photosynthetic system. Plants absorb light primarily using the pigment chlorophyll. The green part of the light spectrum is not absorbed but is reflected, which is the reason that most plants have a green color. Besides chlorophyll, plants also use pigments such as carotenes and xanthophylls. These pigments are embedded in plants and algae in complexes called antenna proteins. In such proteins, the pigments are arranged to work together. Such a combination of proteins is also called a light-harvesting complex. Although all cells in the green parts of a plant have chloroplasts, the majority of those are found in specially adapted structures called leaves. Certain species adapted to conditions of strong sunlight and aridity, such as many Euphorbia and cactus species, have their main photosynthetic organs in their stems. The surface of the leaf is coated with a water-resistant waxy cuticle that protects the leaf from excessive evaporation of water and decreases the absorption of ultraviolet or blue light to minimize heating. The transparent epidermis layer allows light to pass through to the palisade mesophyll cells where most of the photosynthesis takes place. In the light-dependent reactions, one molecule of the pigment chlorophyll absorbs one photon and loses one electron. In addition, this creates a proton gradient across the chloroplast membrane, which is used by ATP synthase in the synthesis of ATP. The chlorophyll molecule ultimately regains the electron it lost when a water molecule is split in a process called photolysis, which releases oxygen. The overall equation for the light-dependent reactions under the conditions of non-cyclic electron flow in green plants is: Not all wavelengths of light can support photosynthesis. The photosynthetic action spectrum depends on the type of accessory pigments present. For example, in green plants, the action spectrum resembles the absorption spectrum for chlorophylls and carotenoids with absorption peaks in violet-blue and red light. The non-absorbed part of the light spectrum is what gives photosynthetic organisms their color and is the least effective for photosynthesis in the respective organisms. In plants, light-dependent reactions occur in the thylakoid membranes of the chloroplasts where they drive the synthesis of ATP and NADPH.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 类囊体本身被类囊体膜所包裹，膜所围成的空间内是一个腔，即类囊体腔。类囊体膜中嵌有光合系统的整合膜蛋白复合物和外周膜蛋白复合物。植物主要利用叶绿素这种色素来吸收光。光谱中绿色的部分不被吸收，而是被反射，这就是大多数植物呈现绿色的原因。除叶绿素外，植物还使用胡萝卜素和叶黄素等色素。在植物和藻类中，这些色素以称为天线蛋白的复合物形式嵌入其中。在这类蛋白中，各种色素被排布在一起协同工作。这样的蛋白质组合也称为捕光复合物。尽管植物绿色部分的所有细胞都含有叶绿体，但其中大多数集中在称为叶片的特化结构中。某些适应强光和干旱条件的物种，如许多大戟属植物和仙人掌类植物，其主要的光合器官位于茎中。叶片表面覆盖着一层防水的蜡质角质层，它保护叶片免于水分过度蒸发，并减少对紫外光或蓝光的吸收，以尽量降低升温。透明的表皮层让光得以穿过，到达栅栏叶肉细胞，大部分光合作用就在那里进行。在光反应中，一个叶绿素色素分子吸收一个光子并失去一个电子。此外，这会在叶绿体膜两侧形成质子梯度，ATP合酶利用该梯度来合成ATP。当一个水分子在称为光解的过程中被分解并释放出氧气时，叶绿素分子最终重新获得它所失去的电子。绿色植物在非循环电子流条件下的光反应可用一个总反应式来表示。并非所有波长的光都能支持光合作用。光合作用的作用光谱取决于所含辅助色素的种类。例如在绿色植物中，作用光谱与叶绿素和类胡萝卜素的吸收光谱相似，吸收峰位于紫蓝光和红光区。光谱中未被吸收的部分赋予光合生物以颜色，同时也是对各生物体的光合作用最无效的部分。在植物中，光反应发生在叶绿体的类囊体膜上，并在那里驱动ATP和NADPH的合成。

paragraphs.text: Approximately 10 seconds after the Big Bang, the temperature of the universe had fallen to the point where lepton, anti-lepton pairs were no longer created. Most leptons and anti-leptons were then eliminated in annihilation reactions, leaving a small residue of leptons. The mass of the universe was then dominated by photons as it entered the following photon epoch. A photon is the quantum of light and all other forms of electromagnetic radiation. It is the carrier for the electromagnetic force. The effects of this force are easily observable at the microscopic and at the macroscopic level because the photon has zero rest mass; this allows long distance interactions. The photon epoch started after most leptons and anti-leptons were annihilated at the end of the lepton epoch, about 10 seconds after the Big Bang. Atomic nuclei were created in the process of nucleosynthesis which occurred during the first few minutes of the photon epoch. For the remainder of the photon epoch the universe contained a hot dense plasma of nuclei, electrons and photons. As a result, photons no longer interacted frequently with matter and the universe became transparent. The highly redshifted photons from this period form the cosmic microwave background. Tiny variations in the temperature of the CMB correspond to variations in the density of the universe that were the early "seeds" from which all subsequent structure formation took place. General relativity is the geometric theory of gravitation formulated by Albert Einstein in 1915 and remains the standard description of gravity in modern physics. It extends special relativity and Newton's law of universal gravitation by describing gravity as a manifestation of the curvature of space and time. In this framework, the curvature of spacetime is determined by the energy and momentum of matter and radiation. This relationship is expressed through the Einstein field equations, which link the distribution of matter and energy to the geometry of spacetime. The resulting geometry governs the motion of matter, so that solutions of these equations describe how the universe evolves over time. In this description, the universe is characterized by two quantities: a scale factor, which describes how its overall size changes with time, and a curvature index, which specifies its spatial geometry. The curvature can be flat, positively curved, or negatively curved. The evolution of the scale factor depends on both the spatial curvature and the cosmological constant, which represents the energy density of empty space and may be associated with dark energy.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 大爆炸约10秒之后，宇宙的温度已降到不再产生轻子—反轻子对的程度。随后，大多数轻子和反轻子在湮灭反应中消失，只留下少量轻子残余。此后，宇宙进入随之而来的光子时期，其质量由光子主导。光子是光以及所有其他形式电磁辐射的量子。光子是电磁力的传递者。这种力的作用在微观和宏观层面都很容易观察到，因为光子的静止质量为零，这使得远距离的相互作用成为可能。光子时期始于大多数轻子和反轻子在轻子时期末期湮灭之后，约在大爆炸后10秒。原子核是在核合成过程中形成的，这一过程发生在光子时期最初的几分钟内。在光子时期余下的时间里，宇宙中充满了由原子核、电子和光子组成的高温致密等离子体。结果，光子不再频繁地与物质发生相互作用，宇宙变得透明。这一时期高度红移的光子构成了宇宙微波背景辐射。宇宙微波背景温度上的微小变化，对应着宇宙密度的差异，这些差异正是日后一切结构形成所由来的早期“种子”。广义相对论是阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦于1915年提出的引力几何理论，至今仍是现代物理学中对引力的标准描述。它把引力描述为时空弯曲的表现，从而拓展了狭义相对论和牛顿的万有引力定律。在这一框架中，时空的弯曲由物质和辐射的能量与动量所决定。这种关系通过爱因斯坦场方程来表达，该方程把物质和能量的分布与时空的几何结构联系起来。由此形成的几何结构支配着物质的运动，因此这些方程的解描述了宇宙如何随时间演化。在这一描述中，宇宙由两个量来刻画：一个是标度因子，描述其整体尺度如何随时间变化；另一个是曲率指数，确定其空间几何。这种曲率可以是平直的、正弯曲的或负弯曲的。标度因子的演化既取决于空间曲率，也取决于宇宙学常数；宇宙学常数代表空无空间的能量密度，可能与暗能量有关。

paragraphs.text: Stars brighter and hotter than the Sun are rare, whereas substantially dimmer and cooler stars, known as red dwarfs, make up about 75% of the fusor stars in the Milky Way. The Sun is a population I star, having formed in the galaxy's spiral arms. It has a higher abundance of elements heavier than hydrogen and helium than the older population II stars in the galactic bulge and halo. Elements heavier than hydrogen and helium were formed in the cores of ancient and exploding stars, so the first generation of stars had to die before the universe could be enriched with these atoms. The oldest stars contain few metals, whereas stars born later have more. This higher metallicity is thought to have been crucial to the Sun's development of a planetary system because the planets formed from the accretion of "metals". The region of space dominated by the Solar magnetosphere is the heliosphere, which spans much of the Solar System. Along with light, the Sun radiates a continuous stream of charged particles called the solar wind. The result is a thin, dusty atmosphere, called the interplanetary medium, which extends to at least 100 AU. Activity on the Sun's surface, such as solar flares and coronal mass ejections, disturbs the heliosphere, creating space weather and causing geomagnetic storms. Coronal mass ejections and similar events blow a magnetic field and huge quantities of material from the surface of the Sun. The interaction of this magnetic field and material with Earth's magnetic field funnels charged particles into Earth's upper atmosphere, where its interactions create aurorae seen near the magnetic poles. The largest stable structure within the heliosphere is the heliospheric current sheet, a spiral form created by the actions of the Sun's rotating magnetic field on the interplanetary medium. The inner Solar System is the region comprising the terrestrial planets and the asteroids. This region is within the frost line, which is a little less than 5 AU from the Sun. The four terrestrial or inner planets have dense, rocky compositions, few or no moons, and no ring systems. They are composed largely of refractory minerals such as silicates, which form their crusts and mantles, and metals such as iron and nickel which form their cores. Three of the four inner planets have atmospheres substantial enough to generate weather; all have impact craters and tectonic surface features, such as rift valleys and volcanoes.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 比太阳更明亮、更炽热的恒星很少见，而那些暗弱得多、温度也低得多、被称为红矮星的恒星，约占银河系中能进行核聚变的恒星的75%。太阳是一颗第一星族恒星，形成于银河系的旋臂之中。与银核隆起和银晕中更古老的第二星族恒星相比，太阳含有更高丰度的比氢和氦更重的元素。比氢和氦更重的元素是在古老恒星以及爆发恒星的核心中形成的，因此第一代恒星必须先消亡，宇宙才能富集这些原子。最古老的恒星所含的金属很少，而较晚诞生的恒星含有更多金属。这种较高的金属丰度被认为对太阳形成行星系统至关重要，因为行星正是由“金属”的吸积而形成的。由太阳磁层主导的空间区域是日球层，它延伸覆盖了太阳系的大部分范围。太阳在辐射光的同时，还持续不断地放出一股称为太阳风的带电粒子流。其结果是形成一层稀薄而含尘的大气，称为行星际介质，它至少延伸到100天文单位之外。太阳表面的活动，如太阳耀斑和日冕物质抛射，会扰动日球层，产生空间天气并引发地磁暴。日冕物质抛射及类似事件会把磁场和大量物质从太阳表面吹出。这些磁场和物质与地球磁场相互作用，将带电粒子导入地球高层大气，在那里产生可见于磁极附近的极光。日球层内最大的稳定结构是日球层电流片，它呈螺旋状，由太阳旋转磁场作用于行星际介质而形成。内太阳系是包含类地行星和小行星的区域。这一区域位于霜线以内，霜线距太阳略小于5天文单位。四颗类地行星（即内行星）质地致密、由岩石构成，卫星很少或没有，也没有环系统。它们主要由硅酸盐等难熔矿物构成，这些矿物形成了它们的地壳和地幔；铁、镍等金属则构成了它们的核心。四颗内行星中有三颗拥有足以产生天气的大气；它们全都有撞击坑和构造地貌，如裂谷和火山。

paragraphs.text: The relation governing this evolution is known as the Friedmann equation, introduced by Alexander Friedmann. The curvature determines the global geometry of space. A positively curved universe has a finite volume and can be visualized as a three-dimensional sphere. A flat or negatively curved universe is spatially infinite. Although this may seem counterintuitive, models with flat or negative curvature allow an infinite universe to emerge from an initial state in which the scale factor vanishes, consistent with the cosmological principle. Analogies include an infinite plane or other geometries such as a torus. The ultimate fate of the universe depends on both the curvature and the cosmological constant. A sufficiently dense universe with positive curvature would eventually recollapse in a Big Crunch, possibly followed by a Big Bounce. In contrast, a flat or negatively curved universe would expand indefinitely, approaching a Big Freeze and eventual heat death of the universe. Observations indicate that the expansion of the universe is accelerating, raising the possibility of a Big Rip. Current data suggest that the universe is close to flat, with a density near the critical value separating recollapse from eternal expansion. Some speculative theories have proposed that our universe is but one of a set of disconnected universes, collectively denoted as the multiverse. An easily visualized metaphor of these concepts is a group of separate soap bubbles, in which observers living on one soap bubble cannot interact with those on other soap bubbles, even in principle. According to one common terminology, each "soap bubble" of spacetime is denoted as a universe, whereas humans' particular spacetime is denoted as the universe, just as humans call Earth's moon the Moon. The entire collection of these separate spacetimes is denoted as the multiverse. In Tegmark's scheme multiverses might result from the immense size of the spacetime, from cosmological processes that produce spacetime bubbles, from quantum mechanical unitarity, or because we live in a mathematical construct. If space is infinite, or sufficiently large and uniform, identical instances of the history of Earth's entire Hubble volume occur every so often, simply by chance. The physical basis of these ideas have been challenged. Historically, there have been many ideas of the cosmos and its origin. Theories of an impersonal universe governed by physical laws were first proposed by the Greeks and Indians.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 支配宇宙这种演化的关系式被称为弗里德曼方程,由亚历山大·弗里德曼提出。曲率决定了空间的整体几何形态。正曲率的宇宙体积有限,可以设想为一个三维的球面。平直或负曲率的宇宙在空间上是无限的。尽管这看似违反直觉,但平直或负曲率的模型允许一个无限的宇宙从尺度因子为零的初始状态中产生,这与宇宙学原理相符。可作类比的有无限延伸的平面,或诸如环面之类的其他几何形状。宇宙的最终命运取决于曲率和宇宙学常数这两个因素。一个密度足够大、具有正曲率的宇宙,最终会在“大挤压”中重新坍缩,之后或许会迎来“大反弹”。与之相反,平直或负曲率的宇宙会无限膨胀下去,逐渐走向“大冻结”以及宇宙最终的热寂。观测表明,宇宙的膨胀正在加速,这带来了发生“大撕裂”的可能性。目前的数据显示,宇宙接近平直,其密度接近于区分重新坍缩与永恒膨胀的临界值。一些推测性的理论提出,我们的宇宙只是一组互不相连的宇宙之一,这些宇宙合称为多重宇宙。对这些概念有一个易于想象的比喻,就是一群彼此分离的肥皂泡,生活在一个肥皂泡上的观察者,即便在原理上也无法与其他肥皂泡上的观察者发生相互作用。按照一种通行的说法,每一个时空“肥皂泡”都被称为一个宇宙,而人类所处的那个特定时空则被称为本宇宙,正如人类把地球的卫星称为月球一样。这些彼此分离的时空的全部集合,被称为多重宇宙。在泰格马克的方案中,多重宇宙可能源于时空的浩瀚尺度,源于产生时空泡的宇宙学过程,源于量子力学的幺正性,或是因为我们生活在一个数学构造之中。如果空间是无限的,或者足够大且足够均匀,那么仅仅出于偶然,地球整个哈勃体积的历史就会时不时地出现一模一样的副本。这些观点的物理学依据已受到质疑。从历史上看,关于宇宙及其起源曾有过许多种观念。认为宇宙不具人格、受物理法则支配的理论,最早由希腊人和印度人提出。

paragraphs.text: Evolution is the change in the heritable characteristics of biological populations over successive generations. It occurs when evolutionary processes such as genetic drift and natural selection act on genetic variation, resulting in certain characteristics becoming more or less common within a population over successive generations. The process of evolution has given rise to biodiversity at every level of biological organisation. The scientific theory of evolution by natural selection was conceived independently by two British naturalists, Charles Darwin and Alfred Russel Wallace, in the mid-19th century as an explanation for why organisms are adapted to their physical and biological environments. In successive generations, members of a population are therefore more likely to be replaced by the offspring of parents with favourable characteristics for that environment. In the early 20th century, competing ideas of evolution were refuted and evolution was combined with Mendelian inheritance and population genetics to give rise to modern evolutionary theory. In this synthesis the basis for heredity is in DNA molecules that pass information from generation to generation. The processes that change DNA in a population include natural selection, genetic drift, mutation, and gene flow. All life on Earth, including humanity, shares a last universal common ancestor, which lived approximately 3.5, 3.8 billion years ago. The fossil record includes a progression from early biogenic graphite to microbial mat fossils to fossilised multicellular organisms. Existing patterns of biodiversity have been shaped by repeated formations of new species, changes within species, and loss of species throughout the evolutionary history of life on Earth. Morphological and biochemical traits tend to be more similar among species that share a more recent common ancestor, which historically was used to reconstruct phylogenetic trees, although direct comparison of genetic sequences is a more common method today. Evolutionary biologists have continued to study various aspects of evolution by forming and testing hypotheses as well as constructing theories based on evidence from the field or laboratory and on data generated by the methods of mathematical and theoretical biology. Their discoveries have influenced not just the development of biology but also other fields including agriculture, medicine, and computer science. Evolution in organisms occurs through changes in heritable characteristics, the inherited characteristics of an organism. In humans, for example, eye colour is an inherited characteristic and an individual might inherit the "brown-eye trait" from one of their parents.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 进化是指生物种群的可遗传特征在连续世代中发生的变化。当遗传漂变、自然选择等进化过程作用于遗传变异时，进化便会发生，使某些特征在连续世代中于种群内变得更为常见或更为罕见。进化的过程在生物组织的各个层次上催生了生物多样性。自然选择进化的科学理论由两位英国博物学家查尔斯·达尔文和阿尔弗雷德·拉塞尔·华莱士在19世纪中叶各自独立提出，用以解释生物为何能适应其物理环境和生物环境。因此，在连续世代中，种群成员更有可能被那些具有适应该环境有利特征的亲代的后代所取代。在20世纪初，与进化相竞争的各种观点被驳倒，进化论与孟德尔遗传学和群体遗传学相结合，催生了现代进化理论。在这一综合理论中，遗传的基础在于将信息代代相传的DNA分子。改变种群中DNA的过程包括自然选择、遗传漂变、突变和基因流。地球上的所有生命，包括人类在内，都拥有一个最近的共同祖先，它大约生活在35至38亿年前。化石记录呈现出一个演进序列，从早期的生物成因石墨，到微生物席化石，再到多细胞生物化石。在地球生命的整个进化史中，新物种的反复形成、物种内部的变化以及物种的消亡，共同塑造了现今的生物多样性格局。拥有较近共同祖先的物种之间，形态特征和生化特征往往更为相似，这一点历史上曾被用来重建系统发生树，不过如今更常用的方法是直接比较遗传序列。进化生物学家持续研究进化的各个方面，他们提出并检验假说，并依据来自野外或实验室的证据以及由数学生物学和理论生物学方法所产生的数据来构建理论。他们的发现不仅影响了生物学的发展，也影响了农业、医学和计算机科学等其他领域。生物体的进化通过可遗传特征的变化而发生，可遗传特征即生物体从亲代继承而来的性状。以人类为例，眼睛的颜色就是一种遗传特征，个体可能从父母中的一方继承到“棕眼性状”。

paragraphs.text: Killer T cells are a sub-group of T cells that kill cells that are infected with viruses, or are otherwise damaged or dysfunctional. As with B cells, each type of T cell recognizes a different antigen. Killer T cells are activated when their T-cell receptor binds to this specific antigen in a complex with the MHC Class I receptor of another cell. Recognition of this MHC:antigen complex is aided by a co-receptor on the T cell, called CD8. The T cell then travels throughout the body in search of cells where the MHC I receptors bear this antigen. When an activated T cell contacts such cells, it releases cytotoxins, such as perforin, which form pores in the target cell's plasma membrane, allowing ions, water and toxins to enter. The entry of another toxin called granulysin induces the target cell to undergo apoptosis. T cell killing of host cells is particularly important in preventing the replication of viruses. T cell activation is tightly controlled and generally requires a very strong MHC/antigen activation signal, or additional activation signals provided by "helper" T cells. Helper T cells regulate both the innate and adaptive immune responses and help determine which immune responses the body makes to a particular pathogen. These cells have no cytotoxic activity and do not kill infected cells or clear pathogens directly. They instead control the immune response by directing other cells to perform these tasks. The MHC:antigen complex is also recognized by the helper cell's CD4 co-receptor, which recruits molecules inside the T cell that are responsible for the T cell's activation. Helper T cell activation also requires longer duration of engagement with an antigen-presenting cell. The activation of a resting helper T cell causes it to release cytokines that influence the activity of many cell types. Cytokine signals produced by helper T cells enhance the microbicidal function of macrophages and the activity of killer T cells. In addition, helper T cell activation causes an upregulation of molecules expressed on the T cell's surface, such as CD40 ligand, which provide extra stimulatory signals typically required to activate antibody-producing B cells. On the other hand, the various subsets are also part of the innate immune system, as restricted TCR or NK receptors may be used as pattern recognition receptors. A B cell identifies pathogens when antibodies on its surface bind to a specific foreign antigen.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 杀伤性T细胞是T细胞的一个亚群，专门杀死那些感染了病毒，或是以其他方式受损或功能失常的细胞。与B细胞一样，每一种T细胞都识别一种不同的抗原。当杀伤性T细胞的T细胞受体与另一个细胞MHC I类受体所呈递的这种特异性抗原结合形成复合物时，杀伤性T细胞便被激活。对这种MHC-抗原复合物的识别，由T细胞上一种称为CD8的共受体提供辅助。随后，这种T细胞会遍历全身，搜寻那些MHC I类受体携带该抗原的细胞。当被激活的T细胞接触到这类细胞时，它会释放穿孔素等细胞毒素，在靶细胞的质膜上形成孔洞，使离子、水和毒素得以进入。另一种称为颗粒溶素的毒素进入后，会诱导靶细胞发生凋亡。T细胞对宿主细胞的杀伤，在阻止病毒复制方面尤为重要。T细胞的激活受到严格控制，通常需要非常强的MHC-抗原激活信号，或是由“辅助性”T细胞提供的额外激活信号。辅助性T细胞既调节先天免疫应答，也调节适应性免疫应答，并帮助决定机体针对某一特定病原体作出何种免疫应答。辅助性T细胞不具有细胞毒活性，既不直接杀死受感染的细胞，也不直接清除病原体。相反，辅助性T细胞通过指挥其他细胞来执行这些任务，从而控制免疫应答。MHC-抗原复合物也会被辅助性T细胞的CD4共受体所识别，CD4共受体会招募T细胞内部负责激活该细胞的分子。辅助性T细胞的激活还需要与抗原呈递细胞保持更长时间的接触。静息状态的辅助性T细胞一旦被激活，就会释放出影响多种细胞活性的细胞因子。辅助性T细胞产生的细胞因子信号，能增强巨噬细胞的杀菌功能以及杀伤性T细胞的活性。此外，辅助性T细胞的激活会上调其表面表达的分子，例如CD40配体，这些分子提供激活产生抗体的B细胞通常所需的额外刺激信号。另一方面，这些不同的亚群也是先天免疫系统的一部分，因为受限的T细胞受体或自然杀伤细胞受体可被用作模式识别受体。当B细胞表面的抗体与特定的外来抗原结合时，B细胞便识别出了病原体。

paragraphs.text: Local black carbon deposits on snow and ice also contribute to Arctic warming. Arctic surface temperatures are increasing between three and four times faster than in the rest of the world. Melting of ice sheets near the poles weakens both the Atlantic and the Antarctic limb of thermohaline circulation, which further changes the distribution of heat and precipitation around the globe. The warming will continue past 2100 in the intermediate and high emission scenarios, with future projections of global surface temperatures by year 2300 being similar to millions of years ago. The remaining carbon budget for staying beneath certain temperature increases is determined by modelling the carbon cycle and climate sensitivity to greenhouse gases. This carbon budget corresponds to around 16 years of current emissions. The climate system experiences various cycles on its own which can last for years, decades or even centuries. Their relative frequency can affect global temperature trends on a decadal timescale. Other changes are caused by an imbalance of energy from external forcings. Examples of these include changes in the concentrations of greenhouse gases, solar luminosity, volcanic eruptions, and variations in the Earth's orbit around the Sun. To determine the human contribution to climate change, unique "fingerprints" for all potential causes are developed and compared with both observed patterns and known internal climate variability. For example, solar forcing, whose fingerprint involves warming the entire atmosphere, is ruled out because only the lower atmosphere has warmed. Atmospheric aerosols produce a smaller, cooling effect. Other drivers, such as changes in albedo, are less impactful. Greenhouse gases are transparent to sunlight, and thus allow it to pass through the atmosphere to heat the Earth's surface. The Earth radiates it as heat, and greenhouse gases absorb a portion of it. This absorption slows the rate at which heat escapes into space, trapping heat near the Earth's surface and warming it over time. While water vapour and clouds are the biggest contributors to the greenhouse effect, they primarily change as a function of temperature and are therefore mostly considered to be feedbacks that change climate sensitivity. On the other hand, concentrations of gases such as CO2, tropospheric ozone, CFCs and nitrous oxide are added or removed independently from temperature, and are therefore considered to be external forcings that change global temperatures.
