paragraphs.translation_zh: 积聚在冰雪上的局部黑碳沉积物也会加剧北极变暖。北极地表温度的上升速度是世界其他地区的三到四倍。两极附近冰盖的融化，削弱了热盐环流中的大西洋分支和南极分支，从而进一步改变了全球的热量和降水分布。在中等和高排放情景下，变暖将持续到2100年以后，对2300年全球地表温度的预测显示，其水平将与数百万年前相当。为将升温控制在某一限度以下而剩余的碳预算，是通过对碳循环以及气候对温室气体的敏感度进行建模而确定的。这一碳预算大致相当于当前排放水平下16年的排放量。气候系统自身会经历各种各样的循环，这些循环可能持续数年、数十年乃至数个世纪。这些循环的相对频率能够在十年尺度上影响全球气温的变化趋势。另一些变化则是由外部强迫所导致的能量失衡引起的。这类外部强迫的例子包括温室气体浓度的变化、太阳光度、火山喷发以及地球绕太阳公转轨道的变化。为了确定人类对气候变化的影响，科学家为所有潜在成因建立了各自独特的“指纹”，并将其与观测到的模式以及已知的气候内部变率进行比对。例如，太阳强迫的指纹表现为整个大气层都会变暖，但由于实际上只有低层大气变暖，太阳强迫这一成因便被排除了。大气气溶胶产生的影响较小，且具有冷却作用。其他驱动因素，例如反照率的变化，影响则较小。温室气体对阳光是透明的，因此允许阳光穿过大气层去加热地球表面。地球以热量的形式将这些能量辐射出去，而温室气体则吸收其中的一部分。这种吸收减缓了热量逸入太空的速度，将热量截留在地球表面附近，并随着时间推移使地表升温。尽管水汽和云是温室效应最大的贡献者，但它们主要随温度的变化而变化，因此大多被视为改变气候敏感度的反馈因素。另一方面，二氧化碳、对流层臭氧、氟氯烃和一氧化二氮等气体的浓度，其增减与温度无关，因此被视为改变全球温度的外部强迫。

paragraphs.text: Ordinary matter commonly exists in four states: solid, liquid, gas, and plasma. However, advances in experimental techniques have revealed other previously theoretical phases, such as Bose, Einstein condensates and fermionic condensates. Ordinary matter is composed of two types of elementary particles: quarks and leptons. For example, the proton is formed of two up quarks and one down quark; the neutron is formed of two down quarks and one up quark; and the electron is a kind of lepton. An atom consists of an atomic nucleus, made up of protons and neutrons, and electrons that orbit the nucleus. Soon after the Big Bang, primordial protons and neutrons formed from the quark, gluon plasma of the early universe as it cooled below two trillion degrees. A few minutes later, in a process known as Big Bang nucleosynthesis, nuclei formed from the primordial protons and neutrons. This nucleosynthesis formed lighter elements, those with small atomic numbers up to lithium and beryllium, but the abundance of heavier elements dropped off sharply with increasing atomic number. Some boron may have been formed at this time, but the next heavier element, carbon, was not formed in significant amounts. Big Bang nucleosynthesis shut down after about 20 minutes due to the rapid drop in temperature and density of the expanding universe. Subsequent formation of heavier elements resulted from stellar nucleosynthesis and supernova nucleosynthesis. Ordinary matter and the forces that act on matter can be described in terms of elementary particles. These particles are sometimes regarded as fundamental because they have no known substructure. In most contemporary models they are thought of as points in space. All elementary particles are described by quantum mechanics and exhibit wave, particle duality: their behavior has both particle-like and wave-like aspects manifest under different circumstances. Of central importance is the Standard Model, a theory that is concerned with electromagnetic interactions and the weak and strong nuclear interactions. The Standard Model predicted the existence of the recently discovered Higgs boson, a particle that is a manifestation of a field within the universe that can endow particles with mass. Because of its success in explaining a wide variety of experimental results, the Standard Model is sometimes regarded as a "theory of almost everything". A true force, particle "theory of everything" has not been attained.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 普通物质通常以四种状态存在：固态、液态、气态和等离子态。然而，实验技术的进步揭示了其他一些此前仅停留在理论上的物相，例如玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚态和费米子凝聚态。普通物质由两类基本粒子组成：夸克和轻子。例如，质子由两个上夸克和一个下夸克构成，中子由两个下夸克和一个上夸克构成，而电子则是一种轻子。一个原子由原子核以及绕核运行的电子组成，原子核则由质子和中子构成。大爆炸之后不久，随着早期宇宙冷却到两万亿度以下，原初的质子和中子从夸克-胶子等离子体中形成。几分钟之后，在一个被称为大爆炸核合成的过程中，原子核由这些原初的质子和中子形成。这次核合成形成了较轻的元素，即原子序数较小、直到锂和铍为止的元素，而较重元素的丰度则随原子序数的增大而急剧下降。此时可能形成了少量的硼，但更重的下一个元素碳并未大量形成。由于膨胀中的宇宙温度和密度迅速下降，大爆炸核合成在约20分钟后便停止了。此后较重元素的形成则源于恒星核合成和超新星核合成。普通物质以及作用于物质的各种力，都可以用基本粒子来描述。这些粒子有时被视为基本粒子，因为它们没有已知的内部结构。在大多数当代模型中，这些粒子被看作是空间中的点。所有基本粒子都由量子力学来描述，并表现出波粒二象性：它们的行为既有类似粒子的一面，也有类似波的一面，在不同情形下分别显现。其中处于核心地位的是标准模型，这一理论研究电磁相互作用以及弱核力和强核力相互作用。标准模型预言了希格斯玻色子的存在，这种粒子近来已被发现，它是宇宙中一种能够赋予粒子质量的场的表现。由于成功解释了多种多样的实验结果，标准模型有时被视为一种“几乎万有的理论”。一个真正将力与粒子统一起来的“万有理论”尚未实现。

paragraphs.text: Inherited traits are controlled by genes and the complete set of genes within an organism's genome is called its genotype. The complete set of observable traits that make up the structure and behaviour of an organism is called its phenotype. Some of these traits come from the interaction of its genotype with the environment while others are neutral. Some observable characteristics are not inherited. For example, suntanned skin comes from the interaction between a person's genotype and sunlight; thus, suntans are not passed on to people's children. The phenotype is the ability of the skin to tan when exposed to sunlight. However, some people tan more easily than others, due to differences in genotypic variation; a striking example are people with the inherited trait of albinism, who do not tan at all and are very sensitive to sunburn. Heritable characteristics are passed from one generation to the next via DNA, a molecule that encodes genetic information. DNA is a long biopolymer composed of four types of bases. The sequence of bases along a particular DNA molecule specifies the genetic information, in a manner similar to a sequence of letters spelling out a sentence. Before a cell divides, the DNA is copied, so that each of the resulting two cells will inherit the DNA sequence. Portions of a DNA molecule that specify a single functional unit are called genes; different genes have different sequences of bases. Within cells, each long strand of DNA is called a chromosome. The specific location of a DNA sequence within a chromosome is known as a locus. If the DNA sequence at a locus varies between individuals, the different forms of this sequence are called alleles. DNA sequences can change through mutations, producing new alleles. If a mutation occurs within a gene, the new allele may affect the trait that the gene controls, altering the phenotype of the organism. However, while this simple correspondence between an allele and a trait works in some cases, most traits are influenced by multiple genes in a quantitative or epistatic manner. Evolution can occur if there is genetic variation within a population. Variation comes from mutations in the genome, reshuffling of genes through sexual reproduction and migration between populations. Despite the constant introduction of new variation through mutation and gene flow, most of the genome of a species is very similar among all individuals of that species.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 遗传性状由基因控制，生物体基因组内全部基因的总和称为其基因型。构成生物体结构与行为的全部可观察性状的总和称为其表现型。其中一些性状来自基因型与环境的相互作用，另一些则是中性的。有些可观察的特征并不会遗传。例如，晒黑的皮肤来自人的基因型与阳光之间的相互作用，因此晒黑并不会遗传给后代。在这里，表现型是指皮肤受到阳光照射时能够晒黑的能力。不过，由于基因型变异的差异，有些人比其他人更容易晒黑；一个鲜明的例子是具有白化病这一遗传性状的人，他们完全不会被晒黑，而且对晒伤极为敏感。可遗传的特征通过 DNA 从一代传给下一代，DNA 是一种编码遗传信息的分子。DNA 是由四种碱基组成的长链生物聚合物。某一 DNA 分子上碱基的排列顺序决定了遗传信息，其方式类似于一串字母拼写出一个句子。在细胞分裂之前，DNA 会被复制，使得由此产生的两个细胞都能继承该 DNA 序列。DNA 分子中决定单个功能单位的片段称为基因，不同的基因具有不同的碱基序列。在细胞内，每一条长长的 DNA 链称为染色体。某段 DNA 序列在染色体上的具体位置称为基因座。如果某一基因座上的 DNA 序列在不同个体之间存在差异，那么这段序列的不同形式就称为等位基因。DNA 序列可以通过突变发生改变，从而产生新的等位基因。如果基因内部发生突变，新的等位基因可能会影响该基因所控制的性状，进而改变生物体的表现型。然而，尽管等位基因与性状之间这种简单的对应关系在某些情况下成立，但大多数性状是由多个基因以数量遗传或上位效应的方式共同影响的。如果种群内部存在遗传变异，进化就可能发生。变异来自基因组中的突变、通过有性生殖实现的基因重组以及种群之间的迁移。尽管突变和基因流不断引入新的变异，但一个物种基因组的大部分在该物种所有个体之间都非常相似。

paragraphs.text: The mechanisms used to evade the adaptive immune system are more complicated. The simplest approach is to rapidly change non-essential epitopes on the surface of the pathogen, while keeping essential epitopes concealed. This is called antigenic variation. An example is HIV, which mutates rapidly, so the proteins on its viral envelope that are essential for entry into its host target cell are constantly changing. These frequent changes in antigens may explain the failures of vaccines directed at this virus. The parasite Trypanosoma brucei uses a similar strategy, constantly switching one type of surface protein for another, allowing it to stay one step ahead of the antibody response. Masking antigens with host molecules is another common strategy for avoiding detection by the immune system. In HIV, the envelope that covers the virion is formed from the outermost membrane of the host cell; such "self-cloaked" viruses make it difficult for the immune system to identify them as "non-self" structures. Immunology is a science that examines the structure and function of the immune system. It originates from medicine and early studies on the causes of immunity to disease. The earliest known reference to immunity was during the plague of Athens in 430 BC. Thucydides noted that people who had recovered from a previous bout of the disease could nurse the sick without contracting the illness a second time. In the 18th century, Pierre-Louis Moreau de Maupertuis experimented with scorpion venom and observed that certain dogs and mice were immune to this venom. In the 10th century, Persian physician al-Razi wrote the first recorded theory of acquired immunity, noting that a smallpox bout protected its survivors from future infections. Although he explained the immunity in terms of "excess moisture" being expelled from the blood, therefore preventing a second occurrence of the disease, this theory explained many observations about smallpox known during this time. These and other observations of acquired immunity were later exploited by Louis Pasteur in his development of vaccination and his proposed germ theory of disease. Pasteur's theory was in direct opposition to contemporary theories of disease, such as the miasma theory. It was not until Robert Koch's 1891 proofs, for which he was awarded a Nobel Prize in 1905, that microorganisms were confirmed as the cause of infectious disease. Viruses were confirmed as human pathogens in 1901, with the discovery of the yellow fever virus by Walter Reed.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 用于逃避适应性免疫系统的机制则更为复杂。最简单的策略是迅速改变病原体表面非必需的表位，同时把必需的表位隐藏起来。这种做法称为抗原变异。人类免疫缺陷病毒就是一个例子，它突变迅速，因此其病毒包膜上那些进入宿主靶细胞所必需的蛋白质始终在不断变化。抗原的这种频繁变化或许可以解释针对该病毒的疫苗为何屡屡失败。布氏锥虫这种寄生虫采用类似的策略，不断把一种表面蛋白换成另一种，从而始终领先于抗体反应一步。用宿主分子掩盖抗原是逃避免疫系统侦测的另一种常见策略。在人类免疫缺陷病毒中，包裹病毒颗粒的包膜由宿主细胞的最外层膜构成；这种“自我伪装”的病毒使免疫系统难以把它们识别为“非自身”结构。免疫学是一门研究免疫系统结构与功能的科学。免疫学起源于医学以及对疾病免疫成因的早期研究。已知关于免疫的最早记载出现在公元前 430 年的雅典瘟疫期间。修昔底德注意到，曾经从这种疾病中康复的人可以照料病人而不会再次染病。18 世纪，皮埃尔-路易·莫罗·德·莫佩尔蒂用蝎毒做实验，观察到某些狗和老鼠对这种毒液具有免疫力。10 世纪，波斯医师拉齐写下了有记载以来最早的获得性免疫理论，指出一次天花的患病经历能使幸存者免受日后的感染。尽管拉齐用血液中“多余水分”被排出、从而防止疾病再次发作来解释这种免疫力，但这一理论解释了当时已知的许多关于天花的观察现象。这些以及其他关于获得性免疫的观察，后来被路易·巴斯德加以利用，用于发展疫苗接种并提出疾病的细菌学说。巴斯德的理论与当时流行的疾病学说（如瘴气说）直接对立。直到罗伯特·科赫在 1891 年给出证明，微生物才被确认为传染病的病因，他也因此于 1905 年获得诺贝尔奖。随着沃尔特·里德于 1901 年发现黄热病病毒，病毒被确认为人类的病原体。

paragraphs.text: The word universe may also refer to concepts such as the cosmos, the world, and nature. The word universe derives from the Old French word univers, which in turn derives from the Latin word universus, meaning 'combined into one'. The Latin word 'universum' was used by Cicero and later Latin authors in many of the same senses as the modern English word is used. The same synonyms are found in English, such as everything, the cosmos, the world, and nature. The prevailing model for the evolution of the universe is the Big Bang theory. In the Big Bang model, the earliest state of the universe was extremely hot and dense but the universe cooled during subsequent expansion. The model is based on general relativity and on symmetry assumptions such as the homogeneity and isotropy of space. A version of the model with a cosmological constant and cold dark matter, known as the Lambda-CDM model, provides an excellent account of most observations of the universe. Much of very earliest time is not understood. An intense period of expansion called cosmic inflation is postulated to explain many astronomical observations and set the initial conditions for the Lambda-CDM model. Within the first fraction of a second of the universe's existence, it was extremely dense, and the high energy meant all the particles of the Standard model were in equilibrium. As the universe cooled due to expansion, the state of the universe went through phase transitions analogous to water freezing. Various types of elementary particles associated stably producing a plasma of electrons, protons, and neutrons, with very energetic photons preventing them from binding until about one minute after the Big Bang. During the next few minutes, some protons and neutrons combined to form atomic nuclei through nuclear fusion. This process, known as Big Bang nucleosynthesis, lasted for about 15 minutes, produced helium, with small amounts of deuterium and traces of lithium. No other nuclei formed in significant amounts during this time. All of the neutrons that did not fuse decayed in to protons and electrons. After nucleosynthesis ended, the universe was still far too hot for matter to form neutral atoms, so it contained a hot, dense, optically opaque plasma of negatively charged electrons, neutral neutrinos and positive nuclei. After about 377,000 years, the universe had cooled enough that electrons and nuclei could form the first stable atoms.
paragraphs.translation_zh: “宇宙”一词也可以用来指代寰宇、世界、自然界等概念。“宇宙”一词源自古法语词 univers，而 univers 又源自拉丁语词 universus，意为“合而为一”。拉丁语词 universum 被西塞罗以及后来的拉丁语作家所使用，其许多含义与现代英语中这个词的用法相同。英语中也存在同样的一些近义词，例如万物、寰宇、世界和自然界。关于宇宙演化的主流模型是大爆炸理论。在大爆炸模型中，宇宙最初的状态极其炽热而致密，但随着随后的膨胀，宇宙逐渐冷却。该模型以广义相对论以及空间的均匀性和各向同性等对称性假设为基础。该模型有一个包含宇宙学常数和冷暗物质的版本，称为 Lambda-CDM 模型，它能很好地解释对宇宙的大多数观测结果。对于最早期的大部分时段，人们仍不甚了解。人们假设存在一个称为宇宙暴胀的剧烈膨胀阶段，用以解释众多天文观测，并为 Lambda-CDM 模型设定初始条件。在宇宙存在的最初不到一秒的时间里，它极为致密，高能量意味着标准模型中的所有粒子都处于平衡状态。随着宇宙因膨胀而冷却，宇宙的状态经历了一系列类似于水结冰的相变。各类基本粒子相互结合，稳定地形成了由电子、质子和中子组成的等离子体，而能量极高的光子则阻止它们结合，直到大爆炸约一分钟之后。在接下来的几分钟里，一部分质子和中子通过核聚变结合形成了原子核。这一过程被称为大爆炸核合成，持续了约 15 分钟，生成了氦，以及少量的氘和微量的锂。在此期间，没有其他原子核大量生成。所有没有参与聚变的中子都衰变成了质子和电子。核合成结束后，宇宙仍然过于炽热，物质无法形成中性原子，因此其中充满了一种炽热、致密、对光不透明的等离子体，由带负电的电子、不带电的中微子和带正电的原子核组成。大约 37.7 万年后，宇宙已冷却到足以让电子和原子核结合形成最早的稳定原子。

paragraphs.text: CO2 concentration in the chloroplast becomes possible to estimate with the measurement of mesophyll conductance or gm using an integrated system. With some instruments, even wavelength dependency of the photosynthetic efficiency can be analyzed. A phenomenon known as quantum walk increases the efficiency of the energy transport of light significantly. In the photosynthetic cell of an alga, bacterium, or plant, there are light-sensitive molecules called chromophores arranged in an antenna-shaped structure called a photocomplex. Because that quantum walking takes place at temperatures far higher than quantum phenomena usually occur, it is only possible over very short distances. Obstacles in the form of destructive interference cause the particle to lose its wave properties for an instant before it regains them once again after it is freed from its locked position through a classic "hop". The movement of the electron towards the photo center is therefore covered in a series of conventional hops and quantum walks. Fossils of what are thought to be filamentous photosynthetic organisms have been dated at 3.4 billion years old. More recent studies also suggest that photosynthesis may have begun about 3.4 billion years ago, though the first direct evidence of photosynthesis comes from thylakoid membranes preserved in 1.75-billion-year-old cherts. Oxygenic photosynthesis is the main source of oxygen in the Earth's atmosphere, and its earliest appearance is sometimes referred to as the oxygen catastrophe. Geological evidence suggests that oxygenic photosynthesis, such as that in cyanobacteria, became important during the Paleoproterozoic era around two billion years ago. Modern photosynthesis in plants and most photosynthetic prokaryotes is oxygenic, using water as an electron donor, which is oxidized to molecular oxygen in the photosynthetic reaction center. Several groups of animals have formed symbiotic relationships with photosynthetic algae. These are most common in corals, sponges, and sea anemones. Scientists presume that this is due to the particularly simple body plans and large surface areas of these animals compared to their volumes. In addition, a few marine mollusks, such as Elysia viridis and Elysia chlorotica, also maintain a symbiotic relationship with chloroplasts they capture from the algae in their diet and then store in their bodies. This allows the mollusks to survive solely by photosynthesis for several months at a time. Some of the genes from the plant cell nucleus have even been transferred to the slugs, so that the chloroplasts can be supplied with proteins they need to survive.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 借助一体化系统测量叶肉导度（即 gm），便有可能估算出叶绿体中的二氧化碳浓度。借助某些仪器，甚至可以分析光合效率对波长的依赖关系。一种被称为量子行走的现象显著提高了光能传输的效率。在藻类、细菌或植物的光合细胞中，存在着被称为发色团的光敏分子，它们排列成一种被称为光复合体的天线状结构。由于这种量子行走发生的温度远高于量子现象通常出现的温度，因此它只能在极短的距离内进行。以相消干涉形式出现的障碍会使粒子在一瞬间失去其波动性质，随后粒子通过经典的跳跃从被锁定的位置中解脱出来，再次恢复波动性质。因此，电子朝向光中心的移动是由一系列常规跳跃和量子行走共同完成的。被认为是丝状光合生物的化石，其年代经测定为 34 亿年前。较新的研究也表明，光合作用可能始于约 34 亿年前，不过光合作用的首个直接证据来自保存在 17.5 亿年前燧石中的类囊体膜。产氧光合作用是地球大气中氧气的主要来源，其最早的出现有时被称为氧灾变。地质证据表明，以蓝细菌为代表的产氧光合作用，在约 20 亿年前的古元古代变得重要起来。植物和大多数光合原核生物的现代光合作用都是产氧型的，以水作为电子供体，水在光合反应中心被氧化成分子氧。有几类动物已与光合藻类形成了共生关系。这种共生关系在珊瑚、海绵和海葵中最为常见。科学家推测，这是由于这些动物的身体结构特别简单，且相对于其体积而言表面积很大。此外，少数海洋软体动物，如绿叶海蛞蝓和绿海蛞蝓，也与叶绿体保持着共生关系，它们从食物中的藻类那里夺取叶绿体，然后储存在自己体内。这使得这些软体动物每次能仅靠光合作用存活数月之久。来自植物细胞核的一些基因甚至被转移到了这些海蛞蝓体内，从而能为叶绿体提供其存活所需的蛋白质。

paragraphs.text: Present-day climate change includes both global warming, the ongoing increase in global average temperature, and its wider effects on Earth's climate system. Climate change in a broader sense also includes previous long-term changes to Earth's climate. The modern-day rise in global temperatures is driven by human activities, especially fossil fuel burning since the Industrial Revolution. Fossil fuel use, deforestation, and some agricultural and industrial practices release greenhouse gases. These gases absorb some of the heat that the Earth radiates after it warms from sunlight, warming the lower atmosphere. Earth's atmosphere now has roughly 50% more carbon dioxide, the main gas driving global warming, than it did at the end of the pre-industrial era, reaching levels not seen for millions of years. Climate change has an increasingly large impact on the environment. Heat waves and wildfires are becoming more common. Amplified warming in the Arctic has contributed to thawing permafrost, retreat of glaciers and sea ice decline. Higher temperatures are also causing more intense storms, droughts, and other weather extremes. Rapid environmental change in mountains, coral reefs, and the Arctic is forcing many species to relocate or become extinct. Even if efforts to minimize future warming are successful, some effects will continue for centuries. These include ocean heating, ocean acidification and sea level rise. Climate change threatens people with increased flooding, extreme heat, increased food and water scarcity, more disease, and economic loss. Human migration and conflict can also be a result. The World Health Organization calls climate change one of the biggest threats to global health in the 21st century. Societies and ecosystems will experience more severe risks without action to limit warming. Adapting to climate change through efforts like flood control measures or drought-resistant crops partially reduces climate change risks, although some limits to adaptation have already been reached. Poorer communities are responsible for a small share of global emissions, yet have the least ability to adapt and are most vulnerable to climate change. Additional warming will increase these impacts and can trigger tipping points, such as melting all of the Greenland ice sheet. There is widespread support for climate action worldwide, and most countries aim to stop emitting carbon dioxide. Fossil fuels can be phased out by stopping subsidising them, conserving energy and switching to energy sources that do not produce significant carbon pollution.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 当今的气候变化既包括全球变暖，即全球平均气温的持续上升，也包括它对地球气候系统更广泛的影响。从更广义上讲，气候变化还包括地球气候以往的长期变化。当今全球气温的上升是由人类活动驱动的，尤其是工业革命以来的化石燃料燃烧。化石燃料的使用、森林砍伐以及某些农业和工业活动都会排放温室气体。地球受阳光照射升温后会向外辐射热量，这些气体吸收其中一部分热量，使低层大气变暖。二氧化碳是驱动全球变暖的主要气体，如今地球大气中的二氧化碳含量比前工业时代末期高出约 50%，达到了数百万年来未曾出现的水平。气候变化对环境的影响越来越大。热浪和野火正变得越来越常见。北极地区被放大的变暖效应，导致了永久冻土消融、冰川退缩和海冰减少。气温升高还在引发更猛烈的风暴、干旱和其他极端天气。山地、珊瑚礁和北极地区迅速的环境变化，正迫使许多物种迁移或走向灭绝。即使将未来变暖降到最低的努力取得成功，某些影响仍将持续数个世纪。这些影响包括海洋升温、海洋酸化和海平面上升。气候变化以加剧的洪涝、极端高温、日益严重的粮食和水资源短缺、更多的疾病以及经济损失威胁着人类。人口迁移和冲突也可能是其后果。世界卫生组织称气候变化是 21 世纪全球健康面临的最大威胁之一。如果不采取行动限制变暖，社会和生态系统将面临更严峻的风险。通过防洪措施或抗旱作物等方式适应气候变化，可以部分降低气候变化带来的风险，尽管某些适应能力的极限已经触及。较贫困的社区在全球排放中只占很小的份额，却最缺乏适应能力，也最易受到气候变化的影响。进一步的变暖会加剧这些影响，并可能触发临界点，例如格陵兰冰盖的全部融化。全球范围内对气候行动有着广泛的支持，大多数国家都以停止排放二氧化碳为目标。可以通过停止补贴化石燃料、节约能源以及转向不会产生大量碳污染的能源，来逐步淘汰化石燃料。

paragraphs.text: Work by James Bardeen, Carter, and Hawking in the early 1970s led to the formulation of black hole thermodynamics. These laws describe the behaviour of a black hole in a manner analogous to the laws of thermodynamics. Jacob Bekenstein strengthened this analogy with the properties of mass, surface area, and surface gravity for a black hole related to the thermodynamical concepts of energy, entropy, and temperature respectively. While Cygnus X-1, a stellar-mass black hole, was generally accepted by the scientific community as a black hole by the end of 1973, it would be decades before a supermassive black hole would gain the same broad recognition. The idea that such objects might exist began with models suggesting that powerful quasars or active galactic nuclei in the centre of galaxies were powered by accreting supermassive black holes. When the Hubble Space Telescope launched in the 1990s, optical studies of the centre of galaxy Messier 87 showed it must have a large concentration of mass. The two candidates for this mass were a black hole and a dense cluster of stars. In 1995, interferometric microwave spectra from the Very Long Baseline Array observed H2O masers as they orbited the centre of NGC 4258, a galaxy with a similar central mass. The orbital parameters ruled out dense stellar clusters as an explanation for galactic nuclei, making supermassive black holes the only plausible explanation. In 1999, David Merritt proposed the M, sigma relation, which related the dispersion of the velocity of matter in the centre bulge of a galaxy to the mass of the supermassive black hole at its core. Subsequent studies confirmed this correlation. At the time of the merger, the black holes were approximately 1.4 billion light-years away from Earth and had masses roughly 30 and 35 times that of the Sun. Since the initial discovery in 2015, hundreds more gravitational waves have been observed. On 10 April 2019, the first direct image of a black hole and its vicinity was published, following observations made by the Event Horizon Telescope of the supermassive black hole in Messier 87's galactic centre. In 2020, the Nobel Prize in Physics was awarded for work on black holes. Penrose received the other half for his work showing that the mathematics of general relativity requires the formation of black holes.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 詹姆斯·巴丁、卡特和霍金在 20 世纪 70 年代初的研究，促成了黑洞热力学的建立。这些定律以类比于热力学定律的方式，描述了黑洞的行为。雅各布·贝肯斯坦强化了这一类比，他将黑洞的质量、表面积和表面引力等性质，分别与能量、熵和温度这些热力学概念联系起来。恒星级黑洞天鹅座 X-1 在 1973 年底已被科学界普遍接受为黑洞，但超大质量黑洞要获得同样广泛的认可，还需等上数十年。这类天体可能存在的想法，源自一些模型，这些模型认为星系中心强大的类星体或活动星系核，是由吸积物质的超大质量黑洞提供能量的。20 世纪 90 年代哈勃空间望远镜发射后，对星系梅西耶 87 中心的光学研究表明，那里必定聚集着大量质量。对于这团质量，有两个候选解释：一个是黑洞，另一个是致密的恒星团。1995 年，甚长基线阵列的干涉微波光谱观测到水脉泽围绕 NGC 4258 中心运行，这个星系的中心质量与梅西耶 87 相似。这些轨道参数排除了用致密恒星团来解释星系核的可能，使超大质量黑洞成为唯一合理的解释。1999 年，戴维·梅里特提出了 M-σ 关系，它将星系中心核球中物质的速度弥散度，与核心处超大质量黑洞的质量联系起来。随后的研究证实了这种相关关系。在那次合并发生时，这两个黑洞距地球约 14 亿光年，质量分别约为太阳的 30 倍和 35 倍。自 2015 年首次发现引力波以来，又观测到了数百次引力波。2019 年 4 月 10 日，在事件视界望远镜对梅西耶 87 星系中心超大质量黑洞进行观测之后，黑洞及其周边区域的首张直接成像得以公布。2020 年，诺贝尔物理学奖授予了有关黑洞的研究。彭罗斯凭借证明广义相对论的数学必然导致黑洞形成的研究，获得了该奖的另一半。

paragraphs.text: Around 1850 thermometer records began to provide global coverage. Between the 18th century and 1970 there was little net warming, as the warming impact of greenhouse gas emissions was offset by cooling from sulfur dioxide emissions. Sulfur dioxide causes acid rain, but it also produces sulfate aerosols in the atmosphere, which reflect sunlight and cause global dimming. After 1970, the increasing accumulation of greenhouse gases and controls on sulfur pollution led to a marked increase in temperature. Ongoing changes in climate have had no precedent for several thousand years. From 1998 to 2013, negative phases of two such processes, Pacific Decadal Oscillation and Atlantic Multidecadal Oscillation caused a short slower period of warming called the "global warming hiatus". This is why the temperature change is defined in terms of a 20-year average, which reduces the noise of hot and cold years and decadal climate patterns, and detects the long-term signal. A wide range of other observations reinforce the evidence of warming. The upper atmosphere is cooling, because greenhouse gases are trapping heat near the Earth's surface, and so less heat is radiating into space. Warming reduces average snow cover and forces the retreat of glaciers. At the same time, warming also causes greater evaporation from the oceans, leading to more atmospheric humidity, and more and heavier precipitation. Plants are flowering earlier in spring, and thousands of animal species have been permanently moving to cooler areas. Different regions of the world warm at different rates. The pattern is independent of where greenhouse gases are emitted, because the gases persist long enough to diffuse across the planet. Since the pre-industrial period, the average surface temperature over land regions has increased almost twice as fast as the global average surface temperature. This is because oceans lose more heat by evaporation and oceans can store a lot of heat. The thermal energy in the global climate system has grown with only brief pauses since at least 1970, and over 90% of this extra energy has been stored in the ocean. The rest has heated the atmosphere, melted ice, and warmed the continents. The Northern Hemisphere not only has much more land, but also more seasonal snow cover and sea ice. As these surfaces flip from reflecting a lot of light to being dark after the ice has melted, they start absorbing more heat.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 大约在1850年，温度计记录开始实现全球覆盖。从18世纪到1970年，净增温幅度很小，因为温室气体排放带来的增温效应被二氧化硫排放造成的降温效应所抵消。二氧化硫会造成酸雨，但它也会在大气中生成硫酸盐气溶胶，这些气溶胶反射阳光，导致全球变暗。1970年以后，温室气体的不断累积以及对硫污染的控制，导致气温显著上升。当前持续发生的气候变化是数千年来前所未有的。从1998年到2013年，太平洋年代际振荡和大西洋多年代际振荡这两种过程的负相位，造成了一段短暂的增温放缓期，被称为“全球变暖停滞”。正因如此，气温变化才以20年平均值来定义，这样可以减少冷暖年份和年代际气候模式带来的干扰，从而检测出长期信号。大量其他观测进一步印证了变暖的证据。高层大气正在变冷，因为温室气体将热量滞留在地球表面附近，于是辐射到太空的热量减少了。变暖减少了平均积雪覆盖，并迫使冰川退缩。与此同时，变暖还使海洋蒸发增多，导致大气湿度上升，降水更频繁、更强烈。植物在春季开花的时间提前了，数千种动物正永久性地向更凉爽的地区迁移。世界各地区的增温速度各不相同。这种格局与温室气体在何处排放无关，因为这些气体存留的时间足够长，足以扩散到全球各地。自前工业时期以来，陆地区域的平均地表温度上升速度几乎是全球平均地表温度的两倍。这是因为海洋通过蒸发散失的热量更多，而且海洋能够储存大量热量。至少自1970年以来，全球气候系统中的热能持续增长，仅有短暂停顿，而这些额外能量中有超过90%储存在海洋中。其余部分则加热了大气、融化了冰层，并使各大陆变暖。北半球不仅陆地面积大得多，季节性积雪和海冰也更多。在冰雪融化之后，这些表面从大量反射光线转变为深色，于是开始吸收更多热量。

paragraphs.text: The no-hair theorem establishes that, once it achieves a stable condition after formation, a black hole has only three independent physical properties: mass, electric charge, and angular momentum; the black hole is otherwise featureless. Any two black holes that share the same values for these properties, or parameters, are indistinguishable from one another. A related no hair conjecture proposes that dynamic gravitational collapse always results in an object characterized with only these three properties. The conjecture is currently an unsolved problem. The no hair theorem also makes idealized assumptions in addition to equilibrium that may not apply to astrophysical objects. The simplest equilibrium black hole model with only mass but neither electric charge nor angular momentum is called a Schwarzschild black hole. The most general stationary black hole solution known is the Kerr, Newman metric, which describes a black hole with both charge and angular momentum. The simplest static black holes have mass but neither electric charge nor angular momentum. Contrary to the popular notion of a black hole "sucking in everything" in its surroundings, from far away, the external gravitational field of a black hole is identical to that of any other body of the same mass. While a black hole can theoretically have any positive mass, its charge and angular momentum are limited by its mass, with this limit being greater for more massive black holes. Black holes with the maximum possible combination of charge and spin satisfying this inequality are called extremal black holes. Adding a low-mass object with a lot of charge or angular momentum to an extremal black hole would create a so-called naked singularity, a singularity outside of a black hole. Because these singularities make the universe inherently unpredictable, many physicists believe they could not exist. The weak cosmic censorship hypothesis, proposed by Penrose, rules out the formation of such singularities, when they are created through the gravitational collapse of realistic matter. This hypothesis remains an important area of study because has not yet been proven and it relates to many aspects of general relativity and quantum gravity. The total mass of a nearby black hole can be estimated by analysing the motion of the stars or gas surrounding it. The mass of distant supermassive black holes can be inferred from Doppler broadening of spectral lines emitted by rapidly orbiting gas, a technique called reverberation mapping.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 无毛定理确立了这样一点：黑洞在形成之后一旦达到稳定状态，便只具有三种独立的物理属性，即质量、电荷和角动量；除此之外，黑洞别无任何特征。任何两个黑洞，只要这些属性也就是这些参数的取值相同，彼此之间便无法区分。与之相关的无毛猜想提出，动态引力坍缩总会形成一个仅以这三种属性为特征的天体。这一猜想目前仍是一个尚未解决的问题。无毛定理除了平衡态之外还做出了一些理想化假设，而这些假设对天体物理对象未必适用。只有质量而既无电荷也无角动量的最简单平衡态黑洞模型，被称为史瓦西黑洞。已知最普遍的稳态黑洞解是克尔-纽曼度规，它描述的是一个同时具有电荷和角动量的黑洞。最简单的静态黑洞具有质量，但既无电荷也无角动量。与黑洞会“吸入”其周围一切事物的流行观念相反，从远处看，黑洞的外部引力场与任何其他质量相同的天体完全相同。虽然黑洞理论上可以具有任意正质量，但其电荷和角动量受到质量的限制，且黑洞质量越大，这一上限就越高。在满足这一不等式的前提下，电荷与自旋的组合达到最大可能值的黑洞，被称为极端黑洞。向极端黑洞中加入一个质量很小却带有大量电荷或角动量的天体，将会产生所谓的裸奇点，即位于黑洞之外的奇点。由于这类奇点会使宇宙在本质上变得不可预测，许多物理学家认为它们不可能存在。由彭罗斯提出的弱宇宙监督假说排除了这类奇点的形成，前提是它们由现实物质的引力坍缩所产生。这一假说仍是一个重要的研究领域，因为它尚未得到证明，而且与广义相对论和量子引力的诸多方面息息相关。对于邻近的黑洞，可以通过分析其周围恒星或气体的运动来估算其总质量。遥远的超大质量黑洞的质量，可以根据快速绕转的气体所发出谱线的多普勒展宽推断出来，这一技术被称为回响映射。

paragraphs.text: Present-day extinction rates are 100, 1000 times greater than the background rate and up to 30% of current species may be extinct by the mid 21st century. Human activities are now the primary cause of the ongoing extinction event; global warming may further accelerate it in the future. Despite the estimated extinction of more than 99% of all species that ever lived on Earth, about 1 trillion species are estimated to be on Earth currently with only one-thousandth of 1% described. The role of extinction in evolution is not very well understood and may depend on which type of extinction is considered. The causes of the continuous "low-level" extinction events, which form the majority of extinctions, may be the result of competition between species for limited resources. If one species can out-compete another, this could produce species selection, with the fitter species surviving and the other species being driven to extinction. The intermittent mass extinctions are also important, but instead of acting as a selective force, they drastically reduce diversity in a nonspecific manner and promote bursts of rapid evolution and speciation in survivors. Concepts and models used in evolutionary biology, such as natural selection, have many applications. Artificial selection is the intentional selection of traits in a population of organisms. This has been used for thousands of years in the domestication of plants and animals. More recently, such selection has become a vital part of genetic engineering, with selectable markers such as antibiotic resistance genes being used to manipulate DNA. Proteins with valuable properties have evolved by repeated rounds of mutation and selection in a process called directed evolution. Understanding the changes that have occurred during an organism's evolution can reveal the genes needed to construct parts of the body, genes which may be involved in human genetic disorders. For example, the Mexican tetra is an albino cavefish that lost its eyesight during evolution. Breeding together different populations of this blind fish produced some offspring with functional eyes, since different mutations had occurred in the isolated populations that had evolved in different caves. This helped identify genes required for vision and pigmentation. Evolutionary theory has many applications in medicine. Many human diseases are not static phenomena, but capable of evolution. Viruses, bacteria, fungi and cancers evolve to be resistant to host immune defences, as well as to pharmaceutical drugs.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 如今的物种灭绝速率比背景速率高出100至1000倍，到21世纪中叶，多达30%的现存物种可能灭绝。人类活动如今是这场持续灭绝事件的主要原因，全球变暖未来还可能进一步加速这一进程。尽管据估计曾经在地球上生活过的所有物种中已有超过99%灭绝，但目前地球上估计仍有约1万亿个物种，其中仅有百分之一的千分之一得到了科学描述。灭绝在进化中所扮演的角色尚未被充分理解，而且可能取决于所考量的是哪一种类型的灭绝。持续的“低水平”灭绝事件构成了灭绝事件的大多数，其成因可能是物种之间对有限资源的竞争。如果一个物种能够在竞争中胜过另一个物种，就可能产生物种选择，适应性更强的物种得以存活，而另一个物种则被逼向灭绝。间歇性的大规模灭绝同样重要，但它们并非作为一种选择力量发挥作用，而是以非特异的方式急剧降低生物多样性，并促使幸存者爆发出快速的进化和物种形成。进化生物学中使用的概念和模型，例如自然选择，有着许多应用。人工选择是指在生物种群中有意地选择某些性状。数千年来，人工选择一直被用于动植物的驯化。近来，这种选择已成为基因工程的重要组成部分，抗生素抗性基因等可筛选标记被用来操控DNA。在一种称为定向进化的过程中，具有宝贵特性的蛋白质通过反复多轮的突变和选择而演化出来。了解生物体在进化过程中发生的变化，可以揭示构建身体各部分所需的基因，而这些基因可能与人类的遗传疾病有关。例如，墨西哥脂鲤是一种白化的洞穴鱼，它在进化过程中失去了视力。将这种盲鱼的不同种群杂交，产生了一些拥有正常视力眼睛的后代，这是因为在不同洞穴中演化、彼此隔离的种群发生了不同的突变。这有助于鉴定出视觉和色素沉着所需的基因。进化论在医学上有许多应用。许多人类疾病并非一成不变的现象，而是能够发生演化的。病毒、细菌、真菌和癌症会通过演化来抵抗宿主的免疫防御以及药物。

paragraphs.text: The universe comprises all of existence: all forms of matter and energy, and the structures they form, from sub-atomic particles to entire galactic filaments. Since the early 20th century, the field of cosmology has established that the universe has been expanding for 13.8 billion years, starting from a dense fireball in an event called the Big Bang. The observable portion of the universe is approximately 93 billion light-years in diameter at present. The total size of the universe is not known. Some of the earliest cosmological models of the universe were geocentric, placing Earth at the center. During the Scientific Revolution, astronomical observations led to a heliocentric model. Further observational improvements led to the realization that the Sun is one of a few hundred billion stars in the Milky Way, which is one of a few hundred billion galaxies in the observable universe. At the largest scale, galaxies are distributed uniformly and the same in all directions. At smaller scales, galaxies are distributed in clusters and superclusters, which form immense filaments and voids in space, creating a vast foam-like structure. Discoveries in the early 20th century, including general relativity, led to the modern view of an expanding, isotropic, homogeneous universe. Evidence accumulated supporting the Big Bang theory: an initial hot fireball cooled and becoming less dense as the universe expanded, allowing the first subatomic particles and simple atoms to form. Giant clouds of hydrogen and helium were gradually drawn to the places where matter was most dense, forming the first galaxies, stars, and eventually, everything else. From studying the effects of gravity on both matter and light, it has been discovered that the universe contains much more matter than is accounted for by visible objects; stars, galaxies, nebulae and interstellar gas. This unseen matter is known as dark matter. Stars, planets, and visible gas clouds only form about 6% of this ordinary matter. There are many competing hypotheses about the ultimate fate of the universe and about what, if anything, preceded the Big Bang. The physical universe has been defined as "The totality of all space and time; all that is, has been, and will be. " The universe contains all energy and matter, including therefore planets, moons, stars, galaxies, and the contents of intergalactic space. Some philosophers and scientists support the inclusion of ideas and abstract concepts, such as mathematics and logic, in the definition of the universe.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 宇宙包含一切存在：所有形式的物质和能量，以及它们所构成的结构，小至亚原子粒子，大至整条星系纤维。自20世纪初以来，宇宙学领域已经确认，宇宙在一场名为大爆炸的事件中始于一个致密的火球，并已膨胀了138亿年。目前，宇宙的可观测部分直径约为930亿光年。宇宙的总体大小尚不可知。一些最早的宇宙学模型是地心说的，将地球置于中心。在科学革命期间，天文观测促成了日心说模型的提出。观测手段的进一步改进使人们认识到，太阳只是银河系数千亿颗恒星中的一颗，而银河系又只是可观测宇宙中数千亿个星系中的一个。在最大的尺度上，星系的分布是均匀的，并且在各个方向上都相同。在较小的尺度上，星系聚集成星系团和超星系团，它们在空间中形成巨大的纤维状结构和空洞，构成一种宏大的泡沫状结构。20世纪初的种种发现，包括广义相对论在内，催生了关于一个膨胀的、各向同性的、均质的宇宙的现代观念。支持大爆炸理论的证据不断积累：随着宇宙膨胀，最初炽热的火球逐渐冷却、密度下降，使最早的亚原子粒子和简单原子得以形成。巨大的氢云和氦云逐渐被吸引到物质密度最高的地方，形成了最早的星系和恒星，并最终形成了其他一切。通过研究引力对物质和光的影响，人们发现，宇宙所包含的物质远多于恒星、星系、星云和星际气体等可见天体所能解释的物质总量。这种看不见的物质被称为暗物质。恒星、行星和可见的气体云只占这种普通物质的约6%。关于宇宙的最终命运，以及大爆炸之前是否存在某种事物（如果有的话），存在着许多相互竞争的假说。物理宇宙被定义为：全部空间和时间的总和，是一切现在存在、曾经存在和将要存在的事物。宇宙包含所有的能量和物质，因此也包括行星、卫星、恒星、星系以及星系际空间中的一切。一些哲学家和科学家主张，应将数学和逻辑等观念和抽象概念也纳入宇宙的定义之中。

paragraphs.text: The British argued that military operations should target peripheral areas to wear out German strength, leading to increasing demoralisation, and bolstering resistance forces; Germany itself would be subject to a heavy bombing campaign. An offensive against Germany would then be launched primarily by Allied armour, without using large-scale armies. Eventually, the British persuaded the Americans that a landing in France was infeasible in 1942 and they should instead focus on driving the Axis out of North Africa. At the Casablanca Conference in early 1943, the Allies reiterated the statements issued in the 1942 Declaration and demanded the unconditional surrender of their enemies. The British and Americans agreed to continue to press the initiative in the Mediterranean by invading Sicily to fully secure the Mediterranean supply routes. Following the capture of Bataan, Japanese armies forced some 75,000 Filipino and American prisoners on a 42km death march, resulting in thousands of deaths. The Japanese victories left it overconfident and overextended. The planned invasion was thwarted when an Allied task force, centred on two American fleet carriers, fought Japanese naval forces to a draw in the Battle of the Coral Sea. With its capacity for aggressive action greatly diminished as a result of the Midway battle, Japan attempted to capture Port Moresby by an overland campaign in the Territory of Papua. Guadalcanal soon became a focal point for both sides with heavy commitments of troops and ships in the battle for Guadalcanal, with Japanese forces suffering massive losses in the attrition, especially amongst their elite pilots. By the start of 1943, the Japanese were defeated on the island and withdrew their troops. The first was a disastrous offensive into the Arakan region in late 1942 that forced a retreat back to India by May 1943. The second was the insertion of irregular forces behind Japanese frontlines in February which, by the end of April, had achieved mixed results. Despite considerable losses, in early 1942 Germany and its allies stopped a major Soviet offensive in central and southern Russia, keeping most territorial gains they had achieved during the previous year. The fortress city of Sevastopol, which the Red Army had held out against Axis siege for nearly 250 days, was finally seized with the use of massive artillery bombardments and poison gas. In June 1942 Germany launched its main summer offensive against southern Russia, to seize the oil fields of the Caucasus and occupy the Kuban steppe, while maintaining positions on the northern and central areas of the front.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 英国主张，军事行动应针对外围地区，以消耗德国的实力，从而不断瓦解其士气并增强抵抗力量；德国本土则将遭受猛烈的轰炸行动。随后对德国发动的进攻将主要依靠盟军的装甲部队，而不动用大规模的陆军。最终，英国说服了美国人，使其相信1942年在法国登陆并不可行，应当转而集中力量将轴心国逐出北非。在1943年初的卡萨布兰卡会议上，盟国重申了1942年宣言中发表的声明，并要求敌人无条件投降。英国和美国一致同意，继续在地中海保持主动，通过进攻西西里岛来彻底确保地中海的补给线。在攻占巴丹半岛之后，日军强迫约7.5万名菲律宾和美国战俘进行了一场42公里的死亡行军，导致数千人丧生。一连串的胜利使日本变得过度自信，战线也拉得过长。在珊瑚海海战中，一支以两艘美国舰队航母为核心的盟军特遣舰队与日本海军打成平手，使这场预定的入侵计划受挫。由于中途岛战役使日本发动攻势的能力大为削弱，日本转而企图在巴布亚地区通过陆上战役夺取莫尔兹比港。瓜达尔卡纳尔岛很快成为双方争夺的焦点，两军在瓜岛战役中投入了大量兵力和舰船，日军在消耗战中损失惨重，尤其是其精锐飞行员损失巨大。到1943年初，日军在该岛被击败，并撤走了部队。第一次是1942年末向阿拉干地区发动的一场灾难性进攻，到1943年5月被迫撤回印度。第二次是在2月将非正规部队投送到日军前线后方，到4月底，其战果好坏参半。尽管损失相当惨重，1942年初德国及其盟友仍在俄罗斯中部和南部挡住了苏联的一次大规模攻势，保住了前一年所夺取的大部分领土。塞瓦斯托波尔这座要塞城市，红军曾在轴心国的围攻下坚守了将近250天，最终在大规模炮击和毒气的攻势下被攻陷。1942年6月，德国对俄罗斯南部发动了夏季主攻，企图夺取高加索的油田并占领库班草原，同时维持在战线北部和中部地区的阵地。

paragraphs.text: Nitrous oxide emissions largely come from the microbial decomposition of fertilizer. While methane only lasts in the atmosphere for an average of 12 years, CO2 lasts much longer. The Earth's surface absorbs CO2 as part of the carbon cycle. While plants on land and in the ocean absorb most excess emissions of CO2 every year, that CO2 is returned to the atmosphere when biological matter is digested, burns, or decays. Land-surface carbon sink processes, such as carbon fixation in the soil and photosynthesis, remove about 29% of annual global CO2 emissions. The ocean has absorbed 20 to 30% of emitted CO2 over the last two decades. CO2 is only removed from the atmosphere for the long term when it is stored in the Earth's crust, which is a process that can take millions of years to complete. Around 30% of Earth's land area is largely unusable for humans, 26% is forests, 10% is shrubland and 34% is agricultural land. Deforestation is the main land use change contributor to global warming, as the destroyed trees release CO2, and are not replaced by new trees, removing that carbon sink. Between 2001 and 2018, 27% of deforestation was from permanent clearing to enable agricultural expansion for crops and livestock. Another 24% has been lost to temporary clearing under the shifting cultivation agricultural systems. 26% was due to logging for wood and derived products, and wildfires have accounted for the remaining 23%. Some forests have not been fully cleared, but were already degraded by these impacts. Restoring these forests also recovers their potential as a carbon sink. Local vegetation cover impacts how much of the sunlight gets reflected back into space, and how much heat is lost by evaporation. For instance, the change from a dark forest to grassland makes the surface lighter, causing it to reflect more sunlight. Deforestation can also modify the release of chemical compounds that influence clouds, and can change the roughness of Earth's surface in a way affecting wind speed. In tropic and temperate areas the net effect is to produce significant warming, and forest restoration can make local temperatures cooler. At latitudes closer to the poles, there is a cooling effect as forest is replaced by snow-covered plains. Globally, these increases in surface albedo have been the dominant direct influence on temperature from land use change.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 一氧化二氮的排放主要来自微生物对肥料的分解。甲烷在大气中平均只能存留约 12 年，而二氧化碳的存留时间要长得多。作为碳循环的一部分，地球表面会吸收二氧化碳。陆地和海洋中的植物每年吸收了大部分多余排放的二氧化碳，但当生物物质被消化、燃烧或腐烂时，这些二氧化碳又会重新释放回大气。土壤固碳和光合作用等陆地表面碳汇过程，每年清除全球二氧化碳排放量的约 29%。在过去二十年里，海洋吸收了所排放二氧化碳的 20% 至 30%。只有当二氧化碳被封存于地壳之中时，它才会被长期从大气中清除，而这一过程可能需要数百万年才能完成。地球陆地面积中约有 30% 基本无法供人类利用，26% 为森林，10% 为灌木林地，34% 为农业用地。在土地利用变化中，森林砍伐是导致全球变暖的主要因素，因为被毁的树木会释放二氧化碳，又没有新树取而代之，从而丧失了这一碳汇。在 2001 年至 2018 年间，27% 的森林砍伐源于为扩大种植业和畜牧业而进行的永久性清除。另有 24% 的森林是在轮作耕种的农业制度下因临时性清除而损失的。26% 是为获取木材及其衍生产品而进行的采伐所致，其余 23% 则由野火造成。有些森林虽未被完全清除，但已因这些影响而退化。恢复这些森林也能重新发挥它们作为碳汇的潜力。当地的植被覆盖会影响有多少阳光被反射回太空，以及有多少热量通过蒸发散失。例如，从颜色深暗的森林变为草地会使地表颜色变浅，从而反射更多阳光。森林砍伐还会改变影响云层的化合物的释放，并改变地球表面的粗糙程度，从而影响风速。在热带和温带地区，其净效应是造成显著的增温，而恢复森林则能使当地气温有所下降。在更靠近两极的纬度地区，森林被白雪覆盖的平原取代，则会产生降温效应。在全球范围内，地表反照率的这些增加一直是土地利用变化对气温产生的最主要的直接影响。

paragraphs.text: Finkelstein created a new reference frame to include the point of view of infalling observers. Finkelstein's new frame of reference allowed events at the surface of an imploding star to be related to events far away. By 1962 the two points of view were reconciled, convincing many sceptics that implosion into a black hole made physical sense. The era from the mid-1960s to the mid-1970s was the "golden age of black hole research", when general relativity and black holes became mainstream subjects of research. In this period, solutions to the equations of general relativity under various different physical constraints were discovered. In 1963, Roy Kerr found the exact solution for a rotating black hole. Two years later, Ezra Newman found the axisymmetric solution for a black hole that is both rotating and electrically charged. Sciama discovered a series of important mathematical properties of black hole models dubbed "a black hole has no hair" by Wheeler. The first hints came from work by Vitaly Ginzburg who studied a series of increasing compact stars threaded with intense magnetic fields. He discovered that the fields get trapped on the black hole surface. In 1967, Werner Israel showed that any non-spinning, uncharged collapsing star gives a spherically symmetric black hole: any asymmetry must somehow vanish. Price found that the asymmetry was converted into gravitational waves. This view was held in particular by Vladimir Belinski, Isaak Khalatnikov, and Evgeny Lifshitz, who tried to prove that no singularities appear in generic solutions, although they would later reverse their positions. However, in 1965, Roger Penrose proved that general relativity predicts that singularities appear in all black holes, although this may not still hold when quantum mechanics is taken into account. Astronomical observations also made great strides during this era. However, experimental evidence confirming a black hole was very difficult to obtain and ultimately required efforts from many astronomers. X-ray telescope observations by Riccardo Giacconi's team in 1971 showed that Cygnus X-1 emitted x-rays in rapid, sporadic fashion consistent with a compact source. This became the first candidate black hole. Optical spectroscopy and detailed astrophysical models for Cygnus X-1 were consistent with a binary system of a massive star and compact star generating x-rays as gas from the massive but ordinary star was sucked into its invisible compact companion.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 芬克尔斯坦建立了一个新的参考系，以纳入向内坠落的观察者的视角。芬克尔斯坦的新参考系使得发生在内爆恒星表面的事件能够与遥远之处的事件联系起来。到 1962 年，这两种视角得到了调和，使许多怀疑者相信坍缩成黑洞在物理上是说得通的。从 20 世纪 60 年代中期到 70 年代中期是“黑洞研究的黄金时代”，广义相对论和黑洞在此期间成为主流研究课题。在这一时期，人们发现了广义相对论方程在各种不同物理约束条件下的解。1963 年，罗伊·克尔找到了旋转黑洞的精确解。两年后，埃兹拉·纽曼找到了既旋转又带电的黑洞的轴对称解。夏玛发现了黑洞模型的一系列重要数学性质，惠勒将其称为“黑洞无毛”。最初的线索来自维塔利·金兹堡的研究，他考察了一系列致密程度不断增加、并贯穿着强磁场的恒星。金兹堡发现这些磁场会被束缚在黑洞表面。1967 年，沃纳·伊斯雷尔证明，任何不旋转、不带电的坍缩恒星都会形成一个球对称的黑洞，任何不对称性都必定会以某种方式消失。普赖斯发现这种不对称性被转化成了引力波。弗拉基米尔·别林斯基、伊萨克·哈拉特尼科夫和叶夫根尼·利夫希茨尤其持有这种观点，他们试图证明在一般解中不会出现奇点，不过后来他们改变了立场。然而，1965 年，罗杰·彭罗斯证明广义相对论预言所有黑洞中都会出现奇点，尽管在考虑量子力学之后这一结论可能不再成立。天文观测在这一时代也取得了长足进展。然而，证实黑洞存在的实验证据极难获得，最终需要众多天文学家的共同努力。里卡尔多·贾科尼团队在 1971 年的 X 射线望远镜观测表明，天鹅座 X-1 以快速而零星的方式发出 X 射线，这与一个致密源的特征相符。天鹅座 X-1 由此成为第一个候选黑洞。对天鹅座 X-1 的光学光谱分析和详尽的天体物理模型表明，它与这样一个双星系统相符：一颗大质量恒星和一颗致密星组成双星，当来自那颗质量巨大却属普通恒星的气体被吸入其看不见的致密伴星时，便产生了 X 射线。

paragraphs.text: An individual organism's phenotype results from both its genotype and the influence of the environment it has lived in. The modern evolutionary synthesis defines evolution as the change over time in this genetic variation. The frequency of one particular allele will become more or less prevalent relative to other forms of that gene. Variation disappears when a new allele reaches the point of fixation, when it either disappears from the population or replaces the ancestral allele entirely. Mutations are changes in the DNA sequence of a cell's genome and are the ultimate source of genetic variation in all organisms. When mutations occur, they may alter the product of a gene, or prevent the gene from functioning, or have no effect. About half of the mutations in the coding regions of protein-coding genes are deleterious, the other half are neutral. A small percentage of the total mutations in this region confer a fitness benefit. Some of the mutations in other parts of the genome are deleterious but the vast majority are neutral. Mutations can involve large sections of a chromosome becoming duplicated, which can introduce extra copies of a gene into a genome. Extra copies of genes are a major source of the raw material needed for new genes to evolve. This is important because most new genes evolve within gene families from pre-existing genes that share common ancestors. For example, the human eye uses four genes to make structures that sense light: three for colour vision and one for night vision; all four are descended from a single ancestral gene. New genes can be generated from an ancestral gene when a duplicate copy mutates and acquires a new function. This process is easier once a gene has been duplicated because it increases the redundancy of the system; one gene in the pair can acquire a new function while the other copy continues to perform its original function. Other types of mutations can even generate entirely new genes from previously noncoding DNA, a phenomenon termed de novo gene birth. The generation of new genes can also involve small parts of several genes being duplicated, with these fragments then recombining to form new combinations with new functions. When new genes are assembled from shuffling pre-existing parts, domains act as modules with simple independent functions, which can be mixed together to produce new combinations with new and complex functions.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 单个生物体的表型由其基因型和它所处环境的影响共同决定。现代进化综合论将进化定义为这种遗传变异随时间发生的改变。某一特定等位基因的频率，相对于该基因的其他形式会变得更高或更低。当一个新的等位基因达到固定点时，变异便消失，此时它要么从种群中消失，要么完全取代祖先等位基因。突变是细胞基因组中 DNA 序列的改变，也是所有生物体遗传变异的最终来源。突变发生时，可能改变某个基因的产物，或使该基因失去功能，或没有任何影响。在蛋白质编码基因的编码区中，约有一半的突变是有害的，另一半则是中性的。该区域全部突变中，只有一小部分能带来适应度上的益处。基因组其他部位的一些突变是有害的，但绝大多数是中性的。突变可能涉及染色体大片段发生复制，从而向基因组中引入某个基因的额外拷贝。基因的额外拷贝是新基因进化所需原材料的主要来源。这一点很重要，因为大多数新基因是在基因家族内部，由拥有共同祖先的已有基因进化而来的。例如，人眼用四个基因来构建感光结构：三个负责色觉，一个负责夜视；这四个基因全都源自同一个祖先基因。当一个复制拷贝发生突变并获得新功能时，新基因便可由祖先基因产生。一旦基因被复制，这一过程就更容易发生，因为复制增加了系统的冗余度；一对基因中的一个可以获得新功能，而另一个拷贝则继续执行其原有功能。其他类型的突变甚至能从原本不编码的 DNA 中产生全新的基因，这一现象被称为从头基因诞生。新基因的产生还可能涉及若干基因的小片段被复制，随后这些片段重新组合，形成具有新功能的新组合。当新基因由已有片段重新洗牌组装而成时，结构域充当具有简单独立功能的模块，这些模块可以混合在一起，产生具有全新而复杂功能的新组合。

paragraphs.text: The boundary of no escape is called the event horizon. In general relativity, crossing a black hole's event horizon traps an object inside but produces no locally detectable change. General relativity also predicts that every black hole should have a central singularity, where the curvature of spacetime is infinite. Objects whose gravitational fields are too strong for light to escape were first considered in the 18th century. In 1916, the first solution of general relativity that would characterise a black hole was found. By the late 1950s, this solution began to be interpreted physically as a region of space from which nothing can escape. Black holes were long considered a mathematical curiosity; it was not until the 1960s that theoretical work showed they were a generic prediction of general relativity. The first widely accepted black hole was Cygnus X-1, identified by several researchers independently in 1971. Black holes typically form when very massive stars collapse at the end of their life cycle. After a black hole has formed, it can grow by absorbing mass from its surroundings. Supermassive black holes of millions of solar masses may form by absorbing stars and merging with other black holes, or via direct collapse of gas clouds. There is consensus that supermassive black holes exist in the centres of most galaxies. Quantum field theory in curved spacetime predicts that event horizons emit Hawking radiation, with its rate of emission being inversely proportional to its mass. This causes the black hole to lose mass very slowly, provided it is not accreting matter. However, even the smallest class of black holes observed, stellar black holes, are gaining mass from the cosmic microwave background faster than they are losing mass via Hawking radiation. The presence of a black hole can be inferred through its interaction with matter and electromagnetic radiation such as visible light. Matter falling toward a black hole can form an accretion disk of infalling plasma, heated by friction and emitting light. In extreme cases, this creates a quasar, some of the brightest objects in the universe. Merging black holes can be detected by the gravitational waves they emit. If stars are orbiting a black hole, their motions can be used to determine the black hole's mass and location. The idea of a body so massive that even light could not escape was first proposed in the late 18th century by English astronomer and clergyman John Michell and independently by French scientist Pierre-Simon Laplace.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 无法逃逸的边界被称为事件视界。在广义相对论中，越过黑洞的事件视界会将物体困在其内部，但不会产生任何在局部可探测到的变化。广义相对论还预言，每个黑洞都应有一个中心奇点，那里的时空曲率为无穷大。引力场强到连光都无法逃逸的天体，最早在 18 世纪就被人们设想过。1916 年，人们求得了广义相对论中第一个能够描述黑洞的解。到 20 世纪 50 年代末，这个解开始在物理上被解释为一个任何东西都无法逃逸的空间区域。黑洞长期被视为一种数学上的奇异之物；直到 20 世纪 60 年代，理论研究才表明它们是广义相对论的一个普遍预言。第一个被广泛接受的黑洞是天鹅座 X-1，由几位研究者于 1971 年各自独立地确认。黑洞通常在质量极大的恒星于其生命周期末期发生坍缩时形成。黑洞形成之后，可以通过吸收周围的物质而不断增大。质量达数百万倍太阳质量的超大质量黑洞，可能通过吞噬恒星并与其他黑洞合并而形成，也可能通过气体云的直接坍缩而形成。学界一致认为，大多数星系的中心都存在超大质量黑洞。弯曲时空中的量子场论预言，事件视界会发出霍金辐射，其辐射速率与黑洞质量成反比。只要黑洞不再吸积物质，这种辐射就会使它极其缓慢地损失质量。然而，即使是已观测到的最小一类黑洞，即恒星级黑洞，从宇宙微波背景获得质量的速度，也快于它们通过霍金辐射损失质量的速度。可以通过黑洞与物质以及可见光等电磁辐射的相互作用，推断出它的存在。朝黑洞坠落的物质可以形成由内落等离子体构成的吸积盘，等离子体因摩擦而受热并发出光。在极端情况下，这会形成类星体，即宇宙中最明亮的天体之一。正在合并的黑洞可以通过它们发出的引力波被探测到。如果有恒星围绕黑洞运行，可以利用它们的运动来确定黑洞的质量和位置。天体质量大到连光都无法逃逸这一设想，最早在 18 世纪末由英国天文学家兼牧师约翰·米歇尔提出，法国科学家皮埃尔-西蒙·拉普拉斯也独立地提出了同样的想法。

paragraphs.text: Christiaan Huygens followed on from these observations by discovering Saturn's moon Titan and the shape of the rings of Saturn. In 1677, Edmond Halley observed a transit of Mercury across the Sun, leading him to realize that observations of the solar parallax of a planet could be used to trigonometrically determine the distances between Earth, Venus, and the Sun. Halley's friend Isaac Newton, in his magisterial Principia Mathematica of 1687, demonstrated that celestial bodies are not quintessentially different from Earthly ones: the same laws of motion and of gravity apply on Earth and in the skies. The term "Solar System" entered the English language by 1704, when John Locke used it to refer to the Sun, planets, and comets. In 1705, Halley realized that repeated sightings of a comet were of the same object, returning regularly once every 75, 76 years. This was the first evidence that anything other than the planets repeatedly orbited the Sun, though Seneca had theorized this about comets in the 1st century. Careful observations of the 1769 transit of Venus allowed astronomers to calculate the average Earth, Sun distance as 93,726,900 miles, only 0.8% greater than the modern value. Uranus, having occasionally been observed since 1690 and possibly from antiquity, was recognized to be a planet orbiting beyond Saturn by 1783. In 1838, Friedrich Bessel successfully measured a stellar parallax, an apparent shift in the position of a star created by Earth's motion around the Sun, providing the first direct, experimental proof of heliocentrism. Neptune was identified as a planet some years later, in 1846, thanks to its gravitational pull causing a slight but detectable variation in the orbit of Uranus. Mercury's orbital anomaly observations led to searches for Vulcan, a planet interior of Mercury, but these attempts were quashed with Albert Einstein's theory of general relativity in 1915. In the 20th century, humans began their space exploration around the Solar System, starting with placing telescopes in space since the 1960s. By 1989, all eight planets have been visited by space probes. Probes have returned samples from comets and asteroids, as well as flown through the Sun's corona and visited two dwarf planets. Humans have landed on the Moon during the Apollo program in the 1960s and 1970s and are planning to return to the Moon in the 2020s with the Artemis program.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 克里斯蒂安·惠更斯在前人观测的基础上更进一步，发现了土星的卫星土卫六以及土星环的形状。1677 年，埃德蒙·哈雷观测到一次水星凌日，这使他意识到，对行星太阳视差的观测可以用三角法来测定地球、金星和太阳之间的距离。哈雷的朋友艾萨克·牛顿在其 1687 年的权威著作《自然哲学的数学原理》中证明，天体与地上的物体并无本质区别：同样的运动定律和引力定律既适用于地球，也适用于天空。太阳系一词在 1704 年前后进入英语，当时约翰·洛克用它来指称太阳、行星和彗星。1705 年，哈雷意识到，多次观测到的某颗彗星其实是同一个天体，它每隔七十五到七十六年就有规律地回归一次。这是行星之外的天体也反复绕太阳运行的首个证据，尽管塞内卡早在公元 1 世纪就对彗星提出过这一推测。通过对 1769 年金星凌日的细致观测，天文学家算出地球与太阳的平均距离为 93,726,900 英里，仅比现代数值大 0.8%。天王星自 1690 年以来就被偶尔观测到，可能在古代就已被看到，到 1783 年它被确认为一颗在土星轨道之外运行的行星。1838 年，弗里德里希·贝塞尔成功测量了恒星视差，即地球绕太阳运动所造成的恒星位置的表观移动，从而为日心说提供了首个直接的实验证据。几年之后的 1846 年，海王星被认定为一颗行星，这要归功于它的引力使天王星的轨道产生了微小但可探测的变化。对水星轨道异常的观测促使人们去寻找祝融星，即一颗位于水星轨道以内的行星，但这些尝试随着阿尔伯特·爱因斯坦 1915 年的广义相对论而被否定。进入 20 世纪，人类开始在太阳系内进行太空探索，最先是自 20 世纪 60 年代起把望远镜送入太空。到 1989 年，全部八大行星都已有空间探测器造访过。探测器已从彗星和小行星带回样本，还曾穿越太阳的日冕，并造访了两颗矮行星。人类在 20 世纪 60 年代和 70 年代的阿波罗计划期间登上了月球，如今正计划借助阿尔忒弥斯计划于 21 世纪 20 年代重返月球。

paragraphs.text: Around half of human-caused CO2 emissions have been absorbed by land plants and by the oceans. This fraction is not static and if future CO2 emissions decrease, the Earth will be able to absorb up to around 70%. If they increase substantially, it'll still absorb more carbon than now, but the overall fraction will decrease to below 40%. This is because climate change increases droughts and heat waves that eventually inhibit plant growth on land, and soils will release more carbon from dead plants when they are warmer. The rate at which oceans absorb atmospheric carbon will be lowered as they become more acidic and experience changes in thermohaline circulation and phytoplankton distribution. Uncertainty over feedbacks, particularly cloud cover, is the major reason why different climate models project different magnitudes of warming for a given amount of emissions. A climate model is a representation of the physical, chemical and biological processes that affect the climate system. Models include natural processes like changes in the Earth's orbit, historical changes in the Sun's activity, and volcanic forcing. Models are used to estimate the degree of warming future emissions will cause when accounting for the strength of climate feedbacks. Models also predict the circulation of the oceans, the annual cycle of the seasons, and the flows of carbon between the land surface and the atmosphere. The physical realism of models is tested by examining their ability to simulate current or past climates. Past models have underestimated the rate of Arctic shrinkage and underestimated the rate of precipitation increase. Sea level rise since 1990 was underestimated in older models, but more recent models agree well with observations. Additionally, climate models may be unable to adequately predict short-term regional climatic shifts. A subset of climate models add societal factors to a physical climate model. These models simulate how population, economic growth, and energy use affect, and interact with, the physical climate. With this information, these models can produce scenarios of future greenhouse gas emissions. This is then used as input for physical climate models and carbon cycle models to predict how atmospheric concentrations of greenhouse gases might change. Depending on the socioeconomic scenario and the mitigation scenario, models produce atmospheric CO2 concentrations that range widely between 380 and 1400 ppm. The environmental effects of climate change are broad and far-reaching, affecting oceans, ice, and weather.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 人类活动造成的二氧化碳排放中，约有一半被陆地植物和海洋吸收。这一比例并非固定不变，如果未来二氧化碳排放减少，地球将能够吸收高达约70%。如果排放大幅增加，地球吸收的碳总量仍会比现在多，但吸收的总体比例将下降到40%以下。这是因为气候变化加剧了干旱和热浪，最终抑制陆地上的植物生长，而土壤在温度升高时会从枯死的植物中释放出更多的碳。随着海洋酸化程度加深，以及热盐环流和浮游植物分布发生变化，海洋吸收大气中碳的速率将会降低。对反馈机制、尤其是云量的不确定性，是不同气候模型在给定排放量下预测出不同增温幅度的主要原因。气候模型是对影响气候系统的物理、化学和生物过程的一种表征。气候模型纳入了诸如地球轨道变化、太阳活动的历史变化以及火山强迫等自然过程。在考虑气候反馈强度的情况下，气候模型被用来估算未来排放将造成的增温程度。气候模型还能预测海洋环流、四季的年度循环，以及陆地表面与大气之间的碳流动。气候模型的物理真实性，是通过考察其模拟当前或过去气候的能力来检验的。以往的模型低估了北极海冰缩减的速度，也低估了降水增加的速度。1990年以来的海平面上升在较旧的模型中被低估，但较新的模型与观测结果吻合良好。此外，气候模型可能无法充分预测短期的区域性气候变化。有一类气候模型在物理气候模型的基础上加入了社会因素。这类模型模拟人口、经济增长和能源使用如何影响物理气候并与之相互作用。借助这些信息，这类模型能够生成未来温室气体排放的各种情景。这些情景随后被用作物理气候模型和碳循环模型的输入，以预测大气中温室气体浓度可能发生的变化。根据不同的社会经济情景和减排情景，模型得出的大气二氧化碳浓度范围很广，介于380至1400ppm之间。气候变化对环境的影响广泛而深远，涉及海洋、冰层和天气。

paragraphs.text: In the very early universe matter and antimatter annihilated each other leaving a high density of photons. In the Standard Model of particle physics, equal amounts antimatter and matter should have been created. The cause of this observed baryon asymmetry is not known. The distribution of matter throughout the universe is highly variable. The average density is about 1 proton per 200 litres. Vast volumes of the universe are voids of exceptionally low density. The interstellar medium far from stars but within a galaxy has density of a few protons per litre. The proportions of all types of matter and energy have changed over the history of the universe. The total amount of electromagnetic radiation generated within the universe has decreased by 1/2 in the past 2 billion years. Today, ordinary matter, which includes atoms, stars, galaxies, and life, accounts for only 4.9% of the contents of the universe. The nature of both dark energy and dark matter is unknown. Dark matter, a mysterious form of matter that has not yet been identified, accounts for 26.8% of the cosmic contents. Dark energy, which is the energy of empty space and is causing the expansion of the universe to accelerate, accounts for the remaining 68.3% of the contents. Matter, dark matter, and dark energy are distributed homogeneously throughout the universe over length scales longer than 300 million light-years or so. However, over shorter length-scales, matter tends to clump hierarchically; many atoms are condensed into stars, most stars into galaxies, most galaxies into clusters, superclusters and, finally, large-scale galactic filaments. Typical galaxies range from dwarfs with as few as ten million stars up to giants with one trillion stars. Between the larger structures are voids, which are typically 10, 150 Mpc in diameter. This supercluster spans over 500 million light-years, while the Local Group spans over 10 million light-years. The universe also has vast regions of relative emptiness; the largest known void measures 1.8 billion ly across. The observable universe is isotropic on scales significantly larger than superclusters, meaning that the statistical properties of the universe are the same in all directions as observed from Earth. The universe is bathed in highly isotropic microwave radiation that corresponds to a thermal equilibrium blackbody spectrum of roughly 2.72548 kelvins. The hypothesis that the large-scale universe is homogeneous and isotropic is known as the cosmological principle.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 在极早期的宇宙中，物质与反物质相互湮灭，留下了高密度的光子。按照粒子物理学的标准模型，本应生成数量相等的反物质和物质。目前尚不清楚这种观测到的重子不对称现象的成因。物质在整个宇宙中的分布极不均匀。宇宙的平均密度约为每200升中有1个质子。宇宙中有大片区域是密度极低的空洞。在星系之内、远离恒星处的星际介质，其密度约为每升数个质子。在宇宙的历史进程中，各类物质和能量所占的比例发生了变化。在过去20亿年里，宇宙内部产生的电磁辐射总量减少了一半。如今，包括原子、恒星、星系和生命在内的普通物质，仅占宇宙构成的4.9%。暗能量和暗物质的本质都尚不为人所知。暗物质是一种尚未被确认的神秘物质形态，占宇宙构成的26.8%。暗能量是空荡空间所具有的能量，正使宇宙的膨胀加速，它占据了宇宙构成中剩余的68.3%。在大约3亿光年以上的尺度上，物质、暗物质和暗能量在整个宇宙中均匀分布。然而，在较小的尺度上，物质往往呈层级式聚集；许多原子凝聚成恒星，多数恒星聚成星系，多数星系聚成星系团、超星系团，最终形成大尺度的星系纤维状结构。典型的星系，小到只有一千万颗恒星的矮星系，大到拥有一万亿颗恒星的巨型星系，不一而足。在这些较大结构之间是空洞，其直径通常在10至150兆秒差距之间。这个超星系团横跨超过5亿光年，而本星系群则横跨超过1000万光年。宇宙中还存在大片相对空旷的区域；已知最大的空洞直径达18亿光年。在远大于超星系团的尺度上，可观测宇宙是各向同性的，这意味着从地球上观测，宇宙的统计性质在所有方向上都相同。宇宙沐浴在高度各向同性的微波辐射之中，这种辐射对应于约2.72548开尔文的热平衡黑体谱。认为大尺度宇宙是均匀且各向同性的这一假说，被称为宇宙学原理。

paragraphs.text: In Marxist economics, these owners of the means of production and suppliers of capital are generally called capitalists. The description of the role of the capitalist has shifted, first referring to a useless intermediary between producers, then to an employer of producers, and finally to the owners of the means of production. Labor includes all physical and mental human resources, including entrepreneurial capacity and management skills, which are required to produce products and services. Production is the act of making goods or services by applying labor power. Criticism of capitalism comes from various political and philosophical approaches, including anarchist, socialist, religious and nationalist viewpoints. Of those who oppose it or want to modify it, some believe that capitalism should be removed through revolution while others believe that it should be changed slowly through political reforms. Other critics argue that inequities are not due to the ethic-neutral construct of the economic system commonly known as capitalism, but to the ethics of those who shape and execute the system. For example, some contend that Milton Friedman's ethic of 'maximizing shareholder value' creates a harmful form of capitalism, while Millard Fuller's or John Bogle's ethic of 'enough' creates a sustainable form.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 在马克思主义经济学中，这些生产资料的所有者和资本的提供者通常被称为资本家。对资本家角色的描述几经变化，起初指生产者之间一种无用的中间人，后来指生产者的雇主，最终指生产资料的所有者。劳动包括生产产品和服务所需的全部体力和脑力人力资源，其中也包含创业才能和管理技能。生产是指运用劳动力来制造商品或提供服务的活动。对资本主义的批评来自各种政治和哲学立场，包括无政府主义、社会主义、宗教和民族主义的观点。在那些反对资本主义或希望对其加以改造的人当中，一些人认为应当通过革命来铲除资本主义，另一些人则认为应当通过政治改革来逐步改变它。另一些批评者则认为，种种不公平并非源于通常被称为资本主义的这一伦理中立的经济制度本身，而是源于那些塑造和执行该制度之人的伦理。例如，有人主张，米尔顿·弗里德曼“股东价值最大化”的伦理造就了一种有害的资本主义，而米勒德·富勒或约翰·博格尔“知足”的伦理则造就了一种可持续的资本主义。

paragraphs.text: The ocean has a vast amount of energy carried by ocean waves, tides, salinity differences, and ocean temperature differences which can be harnessed to generate electricity. Forms of sustainable marine energy include tidal power, ocean thermal energy and wave power. Offshore wind power is captured by wind turbines placed out on the ocean; it has the advantage that wind speeds are higher than on land, though wind farms are more costly to construct offshore. There are large deposits of petroleum, as oil and natural gas, in rocks beneath the ocean floor. Offshore platforms and drilling rigs extract the oil or gas and store it for transport to land. "Freedom of the seas" is a principle in international law dating from the seventeenth century. It stresses freedom to navigate the oceans and disapproves of war fought in international waters. The International Maritime Organization, which was ratified in 1958, is mainly responsible for maritime safety, liability and compensation, and has held some conventions on marine pollution related to shipping incidents. Ocean governance is the conduct of the policy, actions and affairs regarding the world's oceans.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 海洋蕴藏着由海浪、潮汐、盐度差和海水温差所携带的巨大能量，这些能量可以被利用来发电。可持续海洋能的形式包括潮汐能、海洋温差能和波浪能。海上风能由架设在海面上的风力涡轮机捕获，其优点在于海上风速高于陆地，不过在海上建造风电场成本更高。在海底岩层之下，蕴藏着以石油和天然气形式存在的大量油气资源。海上平台和钻井设备将石油或天然气开采出来并加以储存，以便运往陆地。“海洋自由”是国际法中的一项原则，可追溯到17世纪。这一原则强调在海洋上自由航行的权利，并反对在国际水域中进行战争。国际海事组织于1958年获得批准成立，主要负责海上安全、责任与赔偿事务，并就与航运事故有关的海洋污染问题召开过一些公约会议。海洋治理是指制定和实施有关全球海洋的政策、行动与事务。

paragraphs.text: Free oxygen molecules did not start to accumulate in the atmosphere until the rate of production of oxygen began to exceed the availability of reductant materials that removed oxygen. This point signifies a shift from a reducing atmosphere to an oxidizing atmosphere. O2 showed major variations during the Proterozoic, including a billion-year period of euxinia, until reaching a steady state of more than 15% by the end of the Precambrian. The amount of oxygen in the atmosphere has fluctuated over the last 600 million years, reaching a peak of about 35% around 280 million years ago during the Carboniferous period, significantly higher than today's 21%. Breakdown of pyrite and volcanic eruptions release sulfur into the atmosphere, which reacts and hence reduces oxygen in the atmosphere. However, volcanic eruptions also release carbon dioxide, which can fuel oxygenic photosynthesis by terrestrial and aquatic plants. The cause of the variation of the amount of oxygen in the atmosphere is not precisely understood. Periods with more oxygen in the atmosphere were often associated with more rapid development of animals. Air pollution is the introduction of airborne chemicals, particulate matter or biological materials that cause harm or discomfort to organisms.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 直到氧气的生成速率开始超过那些消耗氧气的还原性物质的供应量，游离氧分子才开始在大气中积累。这一节点标志着大气从还原性大气向氧化性大气的转变。在元古宙期间，氧气含量出现了大幅波动，其中包括一段长达十亿年的硫化缺氧时期，直到前寒武纪末期才达到 15% 以上的稳定状态。在过去六亿年里，大气中的氧含量一直在波动，约在两亿八千万年前的石炭纪达到约 35% 的峰值，明显高于如今的 21%。黄铁矿的分解和火山喷发会向大气释放硫，硫发生反应，从而消耗大气中的氧气。不过，火山喷发也会释放二氧化碳，而二氧化碳可以为陆生和水生植物的产氧光合作用提供原料。大气中氧含量发生变化的原因，人们尚未确切了解。大气中氧含量较高的时期，往往与动物更为迅速的发展相伴随。空气污染是指向空气中引入会对生物造成危害或不适的化学物质、颗粒物或生物物质。

paragraphs.text: Although doubts have been raised, economically most studies have found growing GM crops to be beneficial to farmers. Gene flow between GM crops and compatible plants, along with increased use of selective herbicides, can increase the risk of "superweeds" developing. Other environmental concerns involve potential impacts on non-target organisms, including soil microbes, and an increase in secondary and resistant insect pests. Many of the environmental impacts regarding GM crops may take many years to be understood and are also evident in conventional agriculture practices. With the commercialisation of genetically modified fish there are concerns over what the environmental consequences will be if they escape. There is a scientific consensus that currently available food derived from GM crops poses no greater risk to human health than conventional food, but that each GM food needs to be tested on a case-by-case basis before introduction. Nonetheless, members of the public are less likely than scientists to perceive GM foods as safe. Genetic engineering features in many science fiction stories. Frank Herbert's novel The White Plague describes the deliberate use of genetic engineering to create a pathogen which specifically kills women.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 尽管有人提出过质疑，但从经济角度看，大多数研究都发现种植转基因作物对农民有利。转基因作物与可杂交植物之间的基因流，加上选择性除草剂使用量的增加，可能会加大“超级杂草”出现的风险。其他环境方面的担忧涉及对包括土壤微生物在内的非目标生物的潜在影响，以及次生害虫和抗性害虫的增多。与转基因作物有关的许多环境影响可能需要多年才能弄清，而且这些影响在传统农业实践中同样存在。随着转基因鱼的商业化，人们担心一旦它们逃逸到自然环境中会带来怎样的环境后果。科学界有一项共识：目前由转基因作物制成的食品对人体健康构成的风险并不高于传统食品，但每一种转基因食品在投入市场前都需逐一进行检测。尽管如此，与科学家相比，公众认为转基因食品安全的可能性要更低。基因工程是许多科幻小说的题材。弗兰克·赫伯特的小说《白色瘟疫》描述了有人蓄意利用基因工程制造出一种专门杀死女性的病原体。

paragraphs.text: The ethnographic dimension of the Boasian approach to language description played a role in the development of disciplines such as sociolinguistics, anthropological linguistics, and linguistic anthropology, which investigate the relations between language, culture, and society. The emphasis on linguistic description and documentation has also gained prominence outside North America, with the documentation of rapidly dying indigenous languages becoming a focus in some university programs in linguistics. Language description is a work-intensive endeavour, usually requiring years of field work in the language concerned, so as to equip the linguist to write a sufficiently accurate reference grammar. The sub-field of translation includes the translation of written and spoken texts across media, from digital to print and spoken. To translate literally means to transmute the meaning from one language into another. Translators are often employed by organizations such as travel agencies and governmental embassies to facilitate communication between two speakers who do not know each other's language. Translators are also employed to work within computational linguistics setups like Google Translate, which is an automated program to translate words and phrases between any two or more given languages.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 博厄斯学派语言描写方法中的民族志维度，在社会语言学、人类学语言学和语言人类学等学科的发展中发挥了作用，这些学科都研究语言、文化与社会之间的关系。对语言描写与记录的重视在北美之外也日益受到关注，对迅速消亡的原住民语言进行记录，已成为一些大学语言学课程的重点。语言描写是一项工作量极大的事业，通常需要对所涉语言进行数年的田野调查，才能使语言学家有能力编写出足够准确的参考语法。翻译这一子领域涵盖跨媒介的书面和口头文本翻译，媒介从数字形式到印刷形式再到口语形式不一而足。翻译的字面含义，就是把意义从一种语言转换到另一种语言。旅行社和政府使馆等机构常常雇用译员，以便在彼此不懂对方语言的两位说话者之间促成沟通。译员还受雇于谷歌翻译这类计算语言学系统，这是一种能在任意两种或多种指定语言之间翻译词语和短语的自动化程序。

paragraphs.text: At constant high irradiance, the rate of carbon assimilation increases as the temperature is increased. These two experiments illustrate several important points: First, it is known that, in general, photochemical reactions are not affected by temperature. However, these experiments clearly show that temperature affects the rate of carbon assimilation, so there must be two sets of reactions in the full process of carbon assimilation. These are the light-dependent 'photochemical' temperature-independent stage, and the light-independent, temperature-dependent stage. Second, Blackman's experiments illustrate the concept of limiting factors. Another limiting factor is the wavelength of light. Cyanobacteria, which reside several meters underwater, cannot receive the correct wavelengths required to cause photoinduced charge separation in conventional photosynthetic pigments. To combat this problem, Cyanobacteria have a light-harvesting complex called Phycobilisome. This complex is made up of a series of proteins with different pigments which surround the reaction center. As carbon dioxide concentrations rise, the rate at which sugars are made by the light-independent reactions increases until limited by other factors. RuBisCO, the enzyme that captures carbon dioxide in the light-independent reactions, has a binding affinity for both carbon dioxide and oxygen.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 在恒定的强光照下，碳同化的速率会随着温度的升高而加快。这两个实验说明了几个要点：首先，人们知道，一般而言光化学反应不受温度的影响。然而，这些实验清楚地表明温度会影响碳同化的速率，因此在碳同化的整个过程中必定存在两类反应。这两类反应分别是光依赖的、属于光化学的、不受温度影响的阶段，以及光非依赖的、受温度影响的阶段。其次，布莱克曼的实验阐明了限制因素这一概念。另一个限制因素是光的波长。生活在水下数米处的蓝细菌，无法接收到在常规光合色素中引发光致电荷分离所需的恰当波长。为了解决这一问题，蓝细菌拥有一种被称为藻胆体的捕光复合体。这种复合体由一系列带有不同色素的蛋白质组成，它们环绕在反应中心周围。随着二氧化碳浓度升高，光非依赖反应生成糖类的速率会加快，直到受到其他因素的限制为止。在光非依赖反应中捕获二氧化碳的酶——核酮糖二磷酸羧化酶，对二氧化碳和氧气都具有结合亲和力。

paragraphs.text: If, as some extensions of the Standard Model posit, quarks and leptons are made up of the even-smaller fundamental particles called preons, a very compact star could be supported by preon degeneracy pressure. A few theoretical objects have been conjectured to match observations of astronomical black hole candidates identically or near-identically, but which function via a different mechanism. A dark energy star would convert infalling matter into vacuum energy; This vacuum energy would be much larger than the vacuum energy of outside space, exerting outwards pressure and preventing a singularity from forming. A black star would be gravitationally collapsing slowly enough that quantum effects would keep it just on the cusp of fully collapsing into a black hole. A gravastar would consist of a very thin shell and a dark-energy interior providing outward pressure to stop the collapse into a black hole or formation of a singularity; It could even have another gravastar inside, called a 'nestar'. The concept of black holes have inspired artists as well as scientists. Some science fiction films have incorporated relativity into their black hole visualizations, leading to results similar to images derived from the Event Horizon Telescope.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 正如标准模型的某些扩展理论所设想的那样，如果夸克和轻子是由称为前子的更小基本粒子构成的，那么一颗极为致密的恒星就可以由前子简并压来支撑。有几种理论天体被推测能够完全或近乎完全地符合对天文学黑洞候选体的观测，但它们的运作机制却与黑洞不同。暗能量星会将落入其中的物质转化为真空能；这种真空能会远大于外部空间的真空能，从而向外施加压力，阻止奇点的形成。黑星的引力坍缩会进行得足够缓慢，以至于量子效应会使它恰好停留在完全坍缩为黑洞的临界点上。引力真空星由一层极薄的外壳和一个暗能量内核构成，内核提供向外的压力，以阻止其坍缩成黑洞或形成奇点；它内部甚至还可以套有另一颗引力真空星，称为“巢星”。黑洞这一概念既启发了科学家，也启发了艺术家。一些科幻电影在对黑洞的视觉呈现中融入了相对论，所得到的效果与事件视界望远镜获得的图像颇为相似。

paragraphs.text: The largest and one of the fastest growing human impacts on the carbon cycle and biosphere is the extraction and burning of fossil fuels, which directly transfer carbon from the geosphere into the atmosphere. Carbon dioxide is also produced and released during the calcination of limestone for clinker production. Clinker is an industrial precursor of cement. As of 2020, about 450 gigatons of fossil carbon have been extracted in total; an amount approaching the carbon contained in all of Earth's living terrestrial biomass. Recent rates of global emissions directly into the atmosphere have exceeded the uptake by vegetation and the oceans. These sinks have been expected and observed to remove about half of the added atmospheric carbon within about a century. Nevertheless, sinks like the ocean have evolving saturation properties, and a substantial fraction of the added carbon is projected to remain in the atmosphere for centuries to millennia. Halocarbons are less prolific compounds developed for diverse uses throughout industry; for example as solvents and refrigerants. Chlorofluorocarbons also cause stratospheric ozone depletion. International efforts are ongoing under the Montreal Protocol and Kyoto Protocol to control rapid growth in the industrial manufacturing and use of these environmentally potent gases.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 人类对碳循环和生物圈影响最大、且增长最快的活动之一，是化石燃料的开采和燃烧，它直接将碳从岩石圈转移到大气中。在为生产熟料而煅烧石灰石的过程中，也会产生并释放二氧化碳。熟料是水泥的一种工业前体。截至2020年，人类总共开采了约4500亿吨化石碳，这一数量已接近地球上所有陆地生物量中所含的碳总量。近年来，全球直接排入大气的碳排放速率，已经超过了植被和海洋的吸收速率。据预期和观测，这些碳汇会在大约一个世纪内清除掉新增大气碳的约一半。然而，海洋之类的碳汇具有不断变化的饱和特性，预计新增碳中有相当一部分会在大气中滞留数百年乃至数千年。卤代烃是产量相对较少的一类化合物，被开发用于工业中的各种用途，例如用作溶剂和制冷剂。氟氯烃还会导致平流层臭氧的损耗。在《蒙特利尔议定书》和《京都议定书》框架下，国际社会正持续努力，以控制这些对环境影响强烈的气体在工业生产和使用上的迅猛增长。

paragraphs.text: The tank, which had been used predominantly for infantry support in the First World War, had evolved into the primary weapon. In the late 1930s, tank design was considerably more advanced than it had been during World War I, and advances continued throughout the war with increases in speed, armour and firepower. At the start of the war, most commanders thought enemy tanks should be met by tanks with superior specifications. This idea was challenged by the poor performance of the relatively light early tank guns against armour, and German doctrine of avoiding tank-versus-tank combat. This, along with Germany's use of combined arms, were among the key elements of their highly successful blitzkrieg tactics across Poland and France. Many means of destroying tanks, including indirect artillery, anti-tank guns, mines, short-ranged infantry antitank weapons, and other tanks were used. Even with large-scale mechanisation, infantry remained the backbone of all forces, and throughout the war, most infantry were equipped similarly to World War I. The portable machine gun spread, a notable example being the German MG 34, and various submachine guns which were suited to close combat in urban and jungle settings.
paragraphs.translation_zh: 在第一次世界大战中，坦克主要用于支援步兵，到了二战时它已发展成为主要的作战武器。20 世纪 30 年代后期，坦克的设计比一战时先进了许多，而且在整个二战期间不断改进，速度、装甲和火力都持续提升。战争初期，大多数指挥官认为应当用性能更优越的坦克去对付敌方坦克。但早期相对轻型的坦克炮对付装甲时表现不佳，加上德军避免坦克对坦克作战的战术原则，使这一观念受到了挑战。这一点，加上德国对诸兵种合成作战的运用，是其在波兰和法国大获成功的闪电战战术中的关键要素之一。人们使用了多种摧毁坦克的手段，包括间接火力的火炮、反坦克炮、地雷、步兵近程反坦克武器，以及其他坦克。即便实现了大规模机械化，步兵仍然是所有军队的中坚力量，而且在整个战争期间，大多数步兵的装备都与一战时期相似。便携式机枪开始普及，德国的 MG 34 就是一个著名的例子，此外还有各种适合在城市和丛林环境中近距离作战的冲锋枪。

paragraphs.text: In the Renaissance, Andreas Vesalius pioneered the modern study of human anatomy by dissection, writing the influential book De humani corporis fabrica. Anatomy advanced further with the invention of the microscope and the study of the cellular structure of tissues and organs. Modern anatomy uses techniques such as magnetic resonance imaging, computed tomography, fluoroscopy and ultrasound imaging to study the body in unprecedented detail. The study of human physiology began with Hippocrates in Ancient Greece, around 420 BCE, and with Aristotle who applied critical thinking and emphasis on the relationship between structure and function. Galen was the first to use experiments to probe the body's functions. In the 17th century, William Harvey described the circulatory system, pioneering the combination of close observation with careful experiment. In the 19th century, physiological knowledge began to accumulate at a rapid rate with the cell theory of Matthias Schleiden and Theodor Schwann in 1838, that organisms are made up of cells. Claude Bernard created the concept of the milieu interieur, which Walter Cannon later said was regulated to a steady state in homeostasis. In the 20th century, the physiologists Knut Schmidt-Nielsen and George Bartholomew extended their studies to comparative physiology and ecophysiology.
